Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobbys choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobbys strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri travels the country diving into some meaty masterpieces starting at a spot in Longmont, Colorado, that serves craft beer and primo pub grub like their piled-high poutine burger. In Dallas, a funky joint mashes up Texas barbecue with pizza to create combos like their potato chip pie. And in Scottsdale, Arizona, a legit Vietnamese spot cooks up specialties like killer clay-pot chicken.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: Supermarket Stakeout is an American cooking competition TV series presented by chef Alex Guarnaschelli. Every participant of the show has a budget of $500 to purchase the groceries from the customers of a nearby supermarket, and create dishes later out of it. In each round the host assigns the theme of the dish to cook. The chef whose dish is judged the least satisfactory is eliminated from the competition, and the final chef remaining gets a prize of $10,000.

programme.title: Bobbys Triple Threat
programme.desc: Features one competitor per episode who enters Bobbys secret kitchen to compete against professional chefs in three head-to-head rounds. If the competitor can out-cook the titans and earn more points, they take home the cash prize.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm

This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine heads to Delray Beach, Florida, to work with Bobby, the owner of Taverna Trela, in hopes of reviving the flagging clientele. Assisting Chef Robert is the culinary mastermind Jason Giovanni and his sous chef, the swarthy Leonard Persin. Faced with maybe their greatest challenge yet, Chefs Robert and Jason race against the clock to save the restaurant from falling into the hands of rival chef, Jane "the Gain Goblin" Frantzen.

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Infused with her warmth and passion for all things family, Joanna Gaines spends time in the kitchen sharing her favorite recipes, where they come from and why she finds herself returning to them time and time again.

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Infused with her warmth and passion for all things family, Joanna Gaines spends time in the kitchen sharing her favorite recipes, where they come from and why she finds herself returning to them time and time again.

programme.title: Selena + Restaurant
programme.desc: Selena Gomez heads out of her home kitchen and into the kitchens of some of LAs hottest restaurants, with chefs teaching and testing Gomez to see how quickly she can learn the ropes with the ultimate goal of creating a dish good enough to make each restaurants menu.

programme.title: Selena + Restaurant
programme.desc: Selena Gomez and Raquelle meet up with Chef Marcel Vigneron at his Hollywood hotspot, Lemon Grove. Marcel greets Selena with three of his favorite dishes that set the bar for how good her dish will need to be to make the menu! While Raquelle discovers the delights of the professional walk-in refrigerator, Selena creates a colorful dish using some very unusual ingredients. The ultimate decision is down to Marcel and his team on whether her purple plate will be their new special or just a color bomb.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of Bizarre Foods, focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how theyre prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.desc: Authors of War examines the powerful role writers and journalists play in shaping how conflicts are understood. Through letters, memoirs, reports and historical works, the series explores how those who documented wars helped preserve the experiences of soldiers and civilians. programme.title: Sensitive Content
programme.desc: Heroes of the project " Contents "sensitive nature" - people who looking at war through the lens . Stas Kozlyuk, Ephraim Lukatsky , Olga Kovaleva and their colleagues in the shop chose his/her own camera as a tool , not a weapon . This a story about the fine line between professional debt and personal trauma, about attempts save humanity , documenting the disaster. Their work is not just fixing destruction , it is a living memory and testimony truth that is impossible ignore.

programme.title: Pro et contra
programme.desc: Pro et Contra aims to shed light on the perceived wisdom concerning Ukrainian historical events to reveal the factual true stories about what actually happened. Debunking previously held beliefs and concepts, the program shows how distorted facts and falsified accounts created a web of hostile myths extending back for hundreds of years. The opinions of experts enable us to see these events from different viewpoints and come to a truthful conclusion.

programme.title: Downed Pilots of Russia
programme.desc: This documentary film reproduces heroic chronicle struggle Ukrainian defenders of the sky against massed air aggression Russia , combining exclusive footage of the destruction hostile techniques and deep interviews with direct participants events – from scouts to pilots . At the center of the plot are fascinating stories confrontation and detailed analysis unique special operation " Tinytsia ", during whose succeeded to lure to one side Ukraine Russian Mi-8 helicopter , which became one of the most famous victories of the military intelligence . Through the prism of personal experience heroes and showmen confessions prisoners pilots tape reveals not only technical complexity modern war , but also an indomitable will to defend his/her airspace .

programme.title: Titāniks
programme.desc: Savā pirmajā braucienā dodas pasaules lielākais kuģis "Titāniks". Uz kuģa klāja tūkstošiem cilvēku ar cerībām un bailēm gaida nokļūšanu galamērķī – Amerikā. Starp šiem cilvēkiem ir nabadzīgs mākslinieks Džeks, kā arī septiņpadsmit gadus vecā Roza – skaista un bagāta meitene, kurai apnikusi vecāku ārišķīgā un liekulīgā pasaule. "Titānika" būvētāji ir pārliecināti par to, ka kuģi nav iespējams nogremdēt, taču, kad kuģa ceļā gadās milzīgs aisbergs, Rozas un Džeka romantiskais piedzīvojums pārvēršas cīņā par izdzīvošanu.

programme.title: Nerunā ļaunu
programme.desc: Kad amerikāņu ģimene tiek uzaicināta pavadīt nedēļas nogali idilliskā lauku īpašumā, kas pieder jaukai britu ģimenei, ar ko viņi iepazinās atvaļinājumā, viss sākas kā bezrūpīgas sapņu brīvdienas un drīz pārvēršas urdošā psiholoģiskā murgā.

programme.title: Nezvēri
programme.desc: No dzimtenes izceļojis franču pāris Spānijas laukos vada organisko saimniecību, taču rodas nesaskaņas ar vietējiem ciemata iedzīvotājiem.

programme.title: Krūdi
programme.desc: Aizvēsturiska piedzīvojumu komēdija par pasaules pirmo ģimeni, kura dodas unikālā ceļojumā, kad viņu dzimtā ala tiek iznīcināta. Ceļojot pa elpu aizraujošajām ainavām, Krūdi atklāj pasakainu, jaunu vietu, kur mīt vēl neredzētas būtnes. Viņu pasaules uztvere mainās uz visiem laikiem.

programme.title: Dzīves grāmata
programme.desc: Meksikas pilsētā Sanandželā Manolo, Marija un Džoakvins laiku pavadījuši kopā jau kopš bērnības. Lai arī viņu dzīves ir bijušas atšķirīgas - Marija tika nosūtīta uz Eiropu, Džoakvins pievienojās armijai, bet Manolo studēja un kļuva par cīkstoni - viena lieta nemainījās. Manolo un Džoakvins abi vēlas apprecēt Mariju.

programme.title: Misija: Izglābt tīģeri
programme.desc: Jauns supervaronis iedraudzējas ar apdraudētu tīģeri, ko sastapis piknika laikā mežā, un uzsāk drosmīgu glābšanas misiju.

programme.title: Meitene vārdā Vilo
programme.desc: Vilo manto mežu, māju un burvju spējas no savas vecmāmiņas Alvinas. Viņai jāatrod vēl trīs meitenes ar maģiskām dāvanām, lai izglābtu mežu. Par laimi, viņai līdzās ir lapsa Rufuss.

programme.title: Džonijs Pafs: Slepenā misija
programme.desc: Džonijs ar draugiem uzsāk slepenu misiju, lai glābtu ciemu no valzirga Oto ļaunajiem plāniem.

programme.title: Bridžitas Džounsas dienasgrāmata
programme.desc: Bridžeta Džonsa ir jauna sieviete, kas pārdzīvo savu vecumu, svaru, darbu, neveiksmes privātajā dzīvē un citas nepilnības. Pienākot Jaunajam gadam, viņa apņemas beidzot sakārtot savu dzīvi, sākt rakstīt pilnīgi atklātu dienasgrāmatu. Dzīve uzņem apgriezienus, kas viņa sāk romānu ar savu bosu, kas izrādās vienkāršs brunču mednieks, un satiek otru savas dzīves vīrieti, kas izskatās diezgan garlaicīgs, tomēr ir lielisks.

programme.title: Ledus laikmets
programme.desc: Dienā, kad zobenzobu vāveri vajā neveiksmes un viņa gandrīz pazaudē savu lielāko dārgumu ozolzīli, visi dzīvnieki dodas ceļā uz dienvidiem, meklējot glābiņu no aukstuma, kas piemeklējis zemi. Sliņķis Sids un mamuts Manfreds par ceļabiedriem kļūst nejauši. Pēc zobenzobu tīģeru uzbrukuma cilvēku apmetnei viņi izglābj mazuli. Par to rūpes uzņemas citkārt slinkais Sids un, kaut gan diezgan negribīgi, arī Manfreds. Nospriežot, ka bērna tētis ir dzīvs, viņi dodas to meklēt. Drīz ceļiniekiem pievienojas arī zobenzobu tīģeris Djego, kura uzdevums ir mazuli nolaupīt. Tā sākas draugu aizraujošais ceļojums, kura laikā visnepiemērotākajos brīžos pie apvāršņa parādās zobenzobu vāvere Skrets, izmisīgi cenzdamies glābt savu ozolzīli.

programme.title: Ledus laikmets 2: Atkusnis
programme.desc: Laika ziņas: Tuvākās piecas dienas ir gaidāmi lieli plūdi, kam sekos pasaules gals. Iespējams, nedēļas beigās varētu izlauzties kāds saules stariņš… Mamutam Manijam, sliņķim Sidam, zobenzobu tīģerim Djego, zobenzobu vāverei Skratam un pārējiem Ledus laikmeta iemītniekiem ir sajūta, ka viņu kūstošā pasaule sāk palikt pārāk slapja un ledus kalns, kas apdraud ieleju, tūlīt lūzīs. Taču tā nav vienīgā problēma – Manijs vairs nevēlas būt viens pats, taču ir pamatotas aizdomas, ka viņš ir pēdējais mamuts. Atkal ir jādodas ceļā, kur tiek satikta valdzinoša mamutiene (iespējams, pēdējā visā pasaulē) Elija, kuru pavada uzņēmīgs oposumu pārītis Krešs un Edijs.

programme.title: Karš par Pērtiķu planētu
programme.desc: Pērtiķu līderis Cēzars saskaras ar personīgu pārbaudījumu, jo viņam uzbrukušie cilvēku karavīri, kurus vada cietsirdīgais Pulkvedis, nogalina viņa tuviniekus. Cēzars ar savu inteliģento pērtiķu armiju stājas pretim cilvēkiem, kuri iznīcina viņu ģimenes. Ar primitīviem ieročiem bruņotās abu sugu armijas tiksies cīņā, kuras laikā tiks izlemts, kura suga kontrolēs Zemi nākotnē.

programme.title: Kā apmierināt sievieti
programme.desc: Kad Džīna zaudē kontroli pār savu tīrīšanas biznesu, kurā nodarbināti tikai vīrieši, viņai jāpieņem pašai sava seksualitāte, ja vēlas uzsākt jaunu dzīvi.

programme.title: Ilgas
programme.desc: Ričards Gīrs atveido biznesa magnātu, kurš sastop savu seno mazpilsētas draudzeni, kura ieradusies lielpilsētā. Vārds pa vārda un viņš uzzina, ka viņiem ir kopīgs bērns, par kuru viņš neko nezināja.

programme.title: Didi
programme.desc: 2008. gadā, pēdējā vasaras mēnesī pirms vidusskolas sākuma, 13 gadus vecs zēns iemācās to, ko viņa ģimene nevar viņam iemācīt: kā slidot, kā flirtēt un kā mīlēt savu mammu.

programme.title: Pēdējais elpas vilciens
programme.desc: Patiess stāsts par dziļjūras nirējiem, kas cīnās, lai izglābtu savu komandas biedru, iesprostotu desmitiem metru zem okeāna virsmas.

programme.title: Nejaukais es
programme.desc: Mīlīgā mazpilsētiņā atrodas melna māja ar nedzīvu zālāju. Kaimiņi pat nenojauš, ka zem mājas atrodas milzu paslēptuve. Sīku pakalpiņu armijas apsargāts, Grū kaldina plānus lielākajai laupīšanai pasaules vēsturē. Viņš ir iecerējis nolaupīt Mēnesi. Jā, Mēnesi! Grū patīk viss ļaunais. Bruņojies ar samazināšanas lāzeru, sasaldēšanas staru un dažnedažādiem kaujas transporta līdzekļiem braukšanai pa zemi un pa gaisu, viņš iznīdē visu, kas gadās ceļā, līdz kādu dienu sastop trīs bārenītes ar apbrīnojamu gribasspēku…

programme.title: Nejaukais es
programme.desc: Kamēr bijušais dižais ļaundaris Gru sāk iejusties ģimenes cilvēka lomā un mēģina godīgi pelnīt iztiku, pārdodot ievārījumu, Antarktīdā kāds nozog slepenu laboratoriju. Ļaunuma apkarošanas organizācijai ir nepieciešama palīdzība, un tās pārstāvji ierodas pie Gru. Kopā ar organizācijas ekscentrisko aģenti Lūsiju Vaildu viņš secina, ka galvenais aizdomās turamais ir par mirušu uzskatītais supernelietis El Mačo, kura dēls ir ieskatījies Gru vecākajā meitā Margo. Pārlieka vēlēšanās pasargāt meitas un arvien pieaugošās simpātijas pret Lūsiju aizmiglo Gru prātu, tādēļ meklējumi nevedas. Tikmēr kāds nelietis paklusām nolaupa Gru palīgus.

programme.title: Tusnīte
programme.desc: Trīs draudzeņu vidū Bjanka ir visatšķirīgākā – gandrīz neredzama. Pasniedzēji neatceras viņas vārdu, un skolasbiedri – nesveicina. Bjankai pašai liekas, ka viss ir kārtībā, bet bērnības draugs skolas smukulītis Vess atklāj, kāds ir meitenes patiesais statuss nežēlīgajā skolas hierarhijā. Pateicoties puisim, Bjanka nolemj mainīt dzīvi. Taču meitenes apņemšanos apdraud skolas skaistule Medisona, kuras nākotnes plānos ietilpst dalība kādā realitātes šovā, tāpēc jau laikus viņa iejūtas lomā, katru savas ikdienas soli dokumentējot ar mobilo telefonu un sociālajos tīklos audzējot "biezu ādu". Viņasprāt, tikai nejauks cilvēks var sasniegt panākumus.

programme.title: Rūķi
programme.desc: Hloja un viņas mamma pārvācas – jau ATKAL! Turklāt viņas pārvācas uz necilu, vecu māju, kas pilna ar dārza rūķiem. Drīz Hloja gan atklāj, ka šī māja slēpj biedējošu noslēpumu. Kādu dienu pēc skolas Hloja kopā ar kaimiņu Liamu atklāj, ka rūķi patiesībā ir dzīvi! Kā izrādās, jau gadiem rūķi ir sargājuši planētu no draudīgiem maziem monstriem, kuri iebrukuši mājā caur portālu, kas ved uz citu pasauli. Kad vienīgais līdzeklis, kas varētu palīdzēt uzveikt monstrus, skolā nonāk nepareizajās rokās, Hlojai un Liamam jāsadarbojas ar rūķiem, lai cīnītos pret mazo negantnieku iebrukumu un glābtu pasauli!

programme.title: Bridžita Džounsa 2. Saprāta robeža
programme.desc: Bridžita Džonsa ir kā apreibusi no attiecībām ar Marku Dārsiju. Viņš ir izglītots, gādīgs un arī iecietīgs pret katru (gandrīz) Bridžitas greizsirdības lēkmi. Kādēļ gan lai ikviena Londonas sieviete nekristu kārdinājumā atņemt Marku tuklajai, ietiepīgajai un dažreiz nepiedienīgajai Bridžitai? Kad pie apvāršņa parādās garkājaina asistente, rozā mākonītis virs Bridžitas galvas savelkas aizdomīgi pelēks, un viņa ar skubu metas pārbaudīt abu attiecības. Taču, kad Bridžitai šķiet, ka sliktāk vairs nevar būt, parādās viņas bijušais priekšnieks, brunču mednieks un siržu lauzējs Daniels Klīvers.

programme.title: Viņš ir viņa
programme.desc: Ļoti brīva Šekspīra lugas "Divpadsmitā nakts" ekranizācija. Pārvācoties uz citu skolu, Viola maina arī savu izskatu un uzdodas par savu dvīņubrāli Sebastjanu, kurš pats pārcēlies uz Londonu. Taču meitene nemaz nenojauš, ka viņu gaida pārsteigums, – viņa iemīlēsies savā istabas biedrā un skolas karstākajā puisī Djūkā, kura sirds savukārt pieder skaistulei Olīvijai. Taču šī meitene ir pamanījusi Sebastjanu – emocionālo puisi, kādi viņai vienmēr patikuši. Un, kaut arī šķiet, ka nekas nevar būt vēl trakāk, ierodas īstais Sebastjans, kurš nemaz nenojauš, ka viņu aizvieto paša dvīņu māsa!

programme.title: Ceļojošā Pils
programme.desc: Kad Sofija tiek pārvērsta par sirmgalvi, viņa bēg no pilsētas un atrod patvērumu Houla maģiskajā pilī. Starp lidojošām pilsētām un kara draudiem viņa atklāj mīlestību un drosmi. Studijas "Ghibli" šedevrs ir sirsnīga un burvīga pasaka.

programme.title: After. Pēc mūsu tikšanās
programme.desc: Tesa pavada pirmo dienu prestižā universitātē. Jaunas sejas, vide, grāmatas, kopmītne, universitātes gaiteņi nupat lielisku mācību gada sākumu, patstāvību un ambiciozu mērķi.Taču dzīve ir pilna dažkārt neparedzamu pavērsienu. Pirmā tikšanās ar istabas biedreni Stefu ierauj Tesu studentu dzīves virpulī ar garām naktīm un Hārdinu. Kopā būšana izvēršas par traku piedzīvojumu, taču šķietami skaistajā stāstā apslēpts drūms noslēpums. Kad tas nāks gaismā, Tesas dzīve vairs nebūs tāda kā agrāk.

programme.title: Baltais zilonis
programme.desc: Bijušais jūras kājinieks Gabriels spiests cīnīties ar savu sirdsapziņu un pārkāpt goda kodeksu, jo viņam jāstrādā mafijas labā. Gabriels izpilda mafijas bosa pavēles, taču, kad viņam ir jālikvidē policiste, emocionālā spriedze sasniedz lūzuma punktu.

programme.title: After. Laimīgi mūžu mūžos
programme.desc: Kad atklājas šokējoša patiesība par abu ģimenēm, mīlētāji atklāj, ka nemaz nav tik atšķirīgi viens no otra. Tesa vairs nav jaukā, vienkāršā, labā meitene, kura satika Hardinu, un Hardins vairs nav tas zēns, kurā viņa kādreiz iemīlējās.

programme.title: After. Pēc kritiena
programme.desc: Tesa ir gatava jaunam dzīves posmam. Spožais prestižas koledžas diploms paver jaunas iespējas – meitene atrod sapņu darbu starptautiskā kompānijā. Viņas nodoms pārcelties uz Sietlu nemaz neiepriecina Hārdinu. Viņa neapmierinātība, pārmetumi un mūžīgā greizsirdība sāpīgi ievaino Tesu un rada bažas. Vai ir vērts visu likt uz kārts un upurēt daudzsološu karjeru? Taču kā lai aizmirst kopā pavadītās naktis un kaislīgos skūpstus, viņa ciešos vīrieša apskāvienus un tuvību, kas padara traku?

programme.title: Arkādija
programme.desc: Nikolass Keidžs atveido tēvu, kurš pasaules gala laikā, nomaļā lauku sētā, kopā ar saviem dvīņu puikām cīnās par izdzīvošanu.

programme.title: Adaptācija
programme.desc: Pazīstams dramaturgs Čārlijs Kaufmans (Nikolass Keidžs) saņem pasūtījumu uzrakstīt filmas scenāriju pēc grāmatas "Orhideju zaglis" motīviem. Tajā žurnāliste Sūzena Orleāna (Merila Strīpa) apraksta avantūristu Džonu Laroču, kas ir tiesāts par īpašu orhideju zādzību no rezervāta. Nespēdams izdomāt scenārijam adekvātu sižeta noslēgumu Čārlijs piekrīt dvīņubrāļa piedāvājumam izsekot žurnālisti. Izrādās, ka grāmatā aprakstītie notikumi ievērojami atšķiras no realitātes un ziedu zagšanai ir pavisam citi iemesli. Sūzena izrādās iesaistījusies avantūrista Laroča dzīvē vairāk nekā parasta vērotāja no malas.

programme.title: Futbols: LaLiga. Sevilla - Real Sociedad
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera Division) is the mens top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda Division and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Futbols: Serie A. Roma - Fiorentina
programme.desc: Coverage of Italys top-flight football league.

programme.title: MotoGP: Grand Prix of Spain
programme.desc: MotoGP race action from the Grand Prix of Spain.

programme.title: Futbols: Ligue 1. PSG - Lorient
programme.desc: PSG, AS Monaco, Marseille, Olympique Lyonnais and Lille... just to name a few. Ligue 1 is currently full of well-organised football teams and incredible European talent, who are a complement to the sport. As the highest professional division in France, it has established itself as one of the top five leagues on the continent. Lyon are the most successful team in regards to consecutive titles, whereas PSG and AS Monaco have managed to propel themselves to the highest achievements in the league, with calculated foreign investment. With the latter coming from a principality, Ligue 1 is another example of a domestic league that provides cross-border competition. From southern wine-growing regions such as Bordeaux, to the historically renowned capital of Paris, we cover the whole of France.

programme.title: Basketbols: Eirolīga. Izslēgšanas spēles. 3. spēle.
programme.desc: The EuroLeague is the top-tier European professional basketball club competition since 2000. The competition replaced the FIBA EuroLeague (which was previously called the FIBA European Champions Cup, or simply the European Cup), which had been run by FIBA since 1958. Starting from 2010/2011 season the tournament is named Turkish Airlines Euroleague, due to a sponsorship contract of Turkish Airlines with EuroLeague, and in 2013 the contract was prolonged to 2020. The tournament is aired in 199 countries of the world. The current EuroLeague structure is made up of 16 teams, which each play each other twice, once at home and once away, in a double round robin league regular season, each team plays 30 games. The top 8 placed teams at the end of the regular season advance to playoffs, each plays a 5 game playoff series against a single opponent. The winners of each playoff series advance to the Final Four held in a predetermined city for two days. The Final Four features two semifinals, a third place game, and the championship game, all on the same weekend.

Anything But Gray
programme.desc: Gray, Grumpy, and Chelcie help a retired couple turn a historic 1915 Charleston home into a vibrant, magical place for their grandkids to visit.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Erin and Ben Napier love their small Mississippi hometown, especially the old historical houses. Using found materials and old textiles, theyre keeping the character of these classic homes but giving them modern and affordable updates. From Erins imaginative hand sketches to Bens custom handiwork, this couple is bringing homes back to life and making sure their small towns future is as bright as its past.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Welcome Home
programme.desc: Chip and Jo help a Waco, TX, couple take on a difficult renovation to transform a 1970s Mediterranean money pit into a Tuscan oasis for their family of three and create a gathering place for extended family.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Jason and Keli Harrison are ready to stop shovelling snow in Pennsylvania and start searching for a new dream home in the Florida Keys. They want their sons to grow up in the sun and sand, so theyre ready for a move to paradise.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but well prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. Well follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you dont have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfronts in USA, looking for homes that wont break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tareks picture-perfect wife, who Tareks friends still cant believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, well follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A young newlywed from NH enlists her friends help to search for a home on beautiful Johns Island, SC, while her husband is away at sea. He works out of the nearby Charleston Port, so the move will give them more time together.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A newly-married couple with three dogs is moving from busy Charleston to James Island, SC. They want a large outdoor space and to be close to beaches and parks, but disagree on the amount of work they want to put into a new home.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation
programme.desc: Finding the perfect home is never easy, but these aspirational house hunters dont plan on making it any easier for themselves. Meet the budding designers, builders and decorators determined to start from scratch and take on the mega projects all for themselves. Each episode features a new group of hopefuls looking to find cheap run-down houses with the aim of rapidly transforming them into their dream family homes. As families and friends embark on their mission to construct their future homes, follow their progress as they encounter all of excitement, stress and chaos that comes with home renovation.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Will, Courtney and their boys have outgrown their starter home, so they enlist Ben and Erin to help them find their forever house. On their wish list is a sizeable, historic house thats rich in character and small town charm. Ben and Erin show the couple two homes: a large house that is short on personality, and a smaller house with loads of character but a long list of necessary repairs. With an all-in budget of $200,000, Will and Courtney have to weigh out what matters most.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: American home improvement series. Presenter Jasmine Roth visits the homes of DIY catastrophes to restore them back to a liveable space. Jasmine brings in the professionals to rescue these renovations-gone-wrong and helps homeowners realise their propertys full potential. With half-demolished houses, unfinished floors and plumbing nightmares: these refurbishment mishaps are on a monumental scale. Luckily, with expertise, hard work and vision, Jasmine and her team can hopefully transform these DIY disasters into something beautiful that their owners will love.

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: A family that survived a devastating house fire buys a home on the lake so they can enjoy their favorite spot year-round. However, the lack of space doesnt fit their needs, so they ask Dave and Jenny to completely overhaul the rustic cabin.

There to help them on their adventure are twin brothers Drew and Jonathan Scott. Some of the amazing people featured on the programme are Rebel Wilson, Bred Pitt, Jeremy Renner, Michael Buble, Allison Janney, LeAnn Rimes, Kevin Hart, and many others.

programme.title: Mexico Life
programme.desc: Mexico is a country unlike many others; gorgeous climate, a Caribbean coastline, vibrant cities, and unimaginable history. This American reality series follows prospective homebuyers as they venture into this Central American paradise to find their dream property, with the help of expert realtors. Whatever their reasons for moving; sun, sand, surf or simply a change of scenery, the realtors aid the buyers every step of the way, helping them to locate ideal properties that they can either move into or enjoy as a holiday home. Follow the couples and families as they set off on a Mexican adventure that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tareks picture-perfect wife, who Tareks friends still cant believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, well follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but well prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. Well follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Erin and Ben Napier love their small Mississippi hometown, especially the old historical houses. Using found materials and old textiles, theyre keeping the character of these classic homes but giving them modern and affordable updates. From Erins imaginative hand sketches to Bens custom handiwork, this couple is bringing homes back to life and making sure their small towns future is as bright as its past.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Welcome Home
programme.desc: Chip and Jo are back with new ideas for turning outdated homes into jaw-dropping, innovative living spaces. Having expanded their business (and their family), the Gaineses now juggle more while renovating, which keeps things unpredictable.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Diamond In the Rough
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny work to return a couples 1920s home to its former glory so they can entertain there. But, it has unstable balconies and a rotting tree.

programme.title: Down Home Fab
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole take on a couples chopped-up ranch house and look to transform it into a bold statement that celebrates rustic elements and a glam open concept. This project could be the showcase for their business, so the pressure is on.

programme.title: Down Home Fab
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole take on a local real estate agent who could help make or break their design business. They look to turn their traditional living areas into an open concept dream kitchen, while ditching their dining room for a new mudroom and pantry.

programme.title: Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Follow an array of Hollywood superstars as they embark on an exciting and heart-warming mission, expressing their gratitude to the most important people in their lives by surprising them with huge and incredible home renovations. There to help them on their adventure are twin brothers Drew and Jonathan Scott. Some of the amazing people featured on the programme are Rebel Wilson, Bred Pitt, Jeremy Renner, Michael Buble, Allison Janney, LeAnn Rimes, Kevin Hart, and many others.

programme.title: Why the Heck Did I Buy This House?

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: American home improvement series. Presenter Jasmine Roth visits the homes of DIY catastrophes to restore them back to a liveable space. Jasmine brings in the professionals to rescue these renovations-gone-wrong and helps homeowners realise their propertys full potential. Luckily, with expertise, hard work and vision, Jasmine and her team can hopefully transform these DIY disasters into something beautiful that their owners will love.

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous

programme.title: Mexico Life
programme.desc: Mexico is a country unlike many others; gorgeous climate, a Caribbean coastline, vibrant cities, and unimaginable history. This American reality series follows prospective homebuyers as they venture into this Central American paradise to find their dream property, with the help of expert realtors. Whatever their reasons for moving; sun, sand, surf or simply a change of scenery, the realtors aid the buyers every step of the way, helping them to locate ideal properties that they can either move into or enjoy as a holiday home. Follow the couples and families as they set off on a Mexican adventure that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: First Home Fix
programme.desc: Raisa and Austin pull off two renovations. Mark and Michael want a space to relax while Bethany and Daves growing family needs storage and functionality.

programme.title: Sin City Rehab
programme.desc: Alison Victoria returns where her design career started to the bright lights and high stakes of Las Vegas! Shes betting on lofty rewards, taking on multi-million-dollar projects and risky flips as she looks to expand her successful design business.

programme.title: Inside Out
programme.desc: The seven-episode series follows Carmine, a real estate agent and interior designer, and Mike, a landscape designer, as they each pitch their design plans to clients. The budget is set, so the guys must be persuasive to score a bigger chunk of the dollars to either max out the interiors or make the most of the outdoor spruce up.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Mike and Carina are ready to leave the hustle and bustle of Las Vegas for the serenity of Little Gasparilla Island, off Floridas west coast. Theyre looking for an eco-friendly home thats close to a natural barrier island.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Ryan, Crystal and their two daughters live right outside Atlanta in Alpharetta, Georgia. They are tired of the traffic, noise and hectic pace of life, so they are looking to move to the peaceful island of St Simons.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you dont have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfronts in USA, looking for homes that wont break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Origins
programme.desc: The Great Pyramid of Giza remains as one of the biggest mysteries of the world, with evidence suggesting it may have been an ancient power plant. Could these structures hold the key to unraveling the truth about humanitys extraterrestrial past?

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: From the producers of Ancient Aliens® and The Curse of Oak Island® From alleged UFO encounters to sudden disappearances to evil possessions, series host William Shatner attempts to get to the truth behind the most bizarre and mysterious events ever reported. With the help of the worlds top scientists, first-hand "experiencer" accounts, and dramatic reenactments, viewers gain shocking insight into whats really happening--and why.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. Pawning was the leading form of consumer credit in the United States until the 1950s, and pawn shops are still helping everyday people make ends meet. "Pawn Stars" takes you inside the colorful world of the pawn business. At the Gold and Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and theres clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. Its up to them to determine whats real and whats fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyones mind, "Whats the story behind it?" and "Whats it worth?"

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: The worlds most mysterious videos, photos, and audio recordings, and uses the best technology and experts to render a credible verdict. Each episode analyzes and passes verdicts on several seemingly impossible things "caught on film" including giant beasts, UFOS, apocalyptic sounds, hairy humans, alleged mutants from the deep, conspiracies, and many other cases. Host and veteran journalist Tony Harris takes nothing for granted in a quest for answers, tracking down eyewitnesses, putting each photo or film through a battery of tests, calling out the hoaxes, and highlighting the most credible evidence in an attempt to better understand our world.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Is Gustav, the legendary man-eating crocodile, accused of killing hundreds of people in Africa, still alive and well today? Are glowing lights spotted in the waters of Mexico the latest proof that Unidentified Submersible Objects are for real? And striking footage emerges out of Phoenix of a pair of dogs who act like they just saw a ghost. Tony and his team of experts examine the evidence to find the truth.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. Pawning was the leading form of consumer credit in the United States until the 1950s, and pawn shops are still helping everyday people make ends meet. "Pawn Stars" takes you inside the colorful world of the pawn business. At the Gold and Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and theres clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. Its up to them to determine whats real and whats fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyones mind, "Whats the story behind it?" and "Whats it worth?"

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: From the producers of Ancient Aliens® and The Curse of Oak Island® From alleged UFO encounters to sudden disappearances to evil possessions, series host William Shatner attempts to get to the truth behind the most bizarre and mysterious events ever reported. With the help of the worlds top scientists, first-hand "experiencer" accounts, and dramatic reenactments, viewers gain shocking insight into whats really happening--and why.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: The worlds most mysterious videos, photos, and audio recordings, and uses the best technology and experts to render a credible verdict. Each episode analyzes and passes verdicts on several seemingly impossible things "caught on film" including giant beasts, UFOS, apocalyptic sounds, hairy humans, alleged mutants from the deep, conspiracies, and many other cases. Host and veteran journalist Tony Harris takes nothing for granted in a quest for answers, tracking down eyewitnesses, putting each photo or film through a battery of tests, calling out the hoaxes, and highlighting the most credible evidence in an attempt to better understand our world.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Chasing Mummies
programme.desc: Zahi is determined to disprove the theories of the so-called pyramidiots, who believe that there are secret underground chambers leading to the Sphinx. Little did anyone know that these caves were home to thousands of bats!

programme.title: Hunting Hitler
programme.desc: An FBI cold case that has laid dormant for 70 years leads a group of world-renown investigators on the ultimate manhunt to finally answer the question: Did Adolf Hitler survive World War II? In early 2014 the FBI declassified hundreds of confidential documents showing that Hitler may have not committed suicide but rather escaped to South America after the fall of Germany. A memo from J. Edgar Hoover himself states "American Army officials in Germany have not located Hitlers body nor is there any reliable source that will say definitely that Hitler is dead." Armed with the most cutting edge technology and these newly released FBI files the team will approach this case like a modern death claims investigation. Whether they are investigating a mysterious Nazi lair deep in the Argentinian jungle or diving for evidence of a missing U-Boat that could of shuttled Hitler to South America our team will focus on the tried and tested tenants for solving a fraudulent death case: follow the money where was the subject last seen, eyewitness reports, make contact with known associates and forensics.With declassified worldwide intelligence providing a wealth of new clues and modern technology never before available we reopen this world famous cold case in hopes of solving the mystery surrounding the demise of one of the biggest criminals of all time.

programme.title: Engineering an Empire
programme.desc: In an era long passed, mighty empires were forged from nothing and rose to the heights of power. Join host Peter Weller, an actor and a professor at Syracuse University as he travels the world to show the engineering feats that gave rise to some of the greatest civilizations known to man. From Rome to the Pharaohs Egypt, from Greece to Carthage, from the Aztecs to the Maya and more, this new program from the History Channel uses computer graphics to explore the architectural, political and cultural glory of the worlds greatest empires.

programme.title: Digging for the Truth
programme.desc: A young man askes the neighbour to water the onion during his absence. The neighbour at first refuses to take the keys. Eventually, she agrees, however. When shes left, the young man takes out a rope and climbs up on the table ... The film based on the play by Ludmila Petrushevskaya, famous russian writer.

programme.title: The Universe
programme.desc: Every day, new information is discovered that helps us better understand how our Universe works. Some of this evidence solves mysteries dating back thousands of years. Some evidence offers new theories on how human civilization came into existence. In this season of The Universe: Ancient Mysteries Solved, well tackle mysteries such as an American Stonehenge built 500 years before Columbus, and how the Aztec Pyramids helped seal the downfall of the Mayan and Aztec empires. Well also look at some of the Roman Empires most iconic structures, and their connection to archeo-astronomy.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Deep Sea Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: In a brand-new Sky HISTORY show, Ross Kemp dives on a series of incredible shipwrecks around the British coastline to reveal some of the nations murkiest and best-kept secrets. From the remains of a slave ship discovered off Plymouth, to the Kaisers sunken Imperial Fleet in Scapa Flow and an experimental submarine aircraft carrier, which sank with all passengers and crew on deck during its sea trials, Ross uncovers Britains hidden maritime past.

programme.title: Engineering an Empire
programme.desc: After a truly trash year, actor, producer, and New York Times bestselling author Phoebe Robinson is finally out of quarantine and ready to get back onstage. Bringing her signature brand of authentic confessional humor to her first-ever solo stand-up special, Robinson gets real about therapy, interracial dating, reparations, hanging out with Michelle Obama, aging out of watching civil rights movies, and more in a no-holds-barred hour of comedy thats both unflinchingly honest – and uniquely hilarious.

programme.title: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: Documentary series that brings back to life lost cities, structures, cultures, and civilisations, transporting viewers back in time and revealing the truth behind some of historys most iconic eras. Using a combination of cutting-edge technology and archaeological research, the team detail what life was like for these places during their peak of their powers, and use visual overlays to compare past and present landscapes. From the Knights Templar to the lost city of Atlantis, ancient Egypt to Hitlers planned supercity, and ancient Athens to Americas wild west, each episodes dives into these extraordinary remnants of human history.

Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Gold Hunters: Legend of the Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: Legend tells of the Lost Dutchmans gold mine hidden somewhere within the 160,000 acres of brutal Arizona desert known as the "Superstition Mountains." The promise of a $200 million mother lode has lured thousands of treasure hunters and continues to claim the lives of those eager to decipher the legends clues and riddles. Hunting for the Lost Dutchman is typically a one-man journey, but lifelong Dutch Hunter Wayne Tuttle is breaking with tradition and partnering with a team of experts to follow a newly revealed clue that could finally solve the 500-year-old mystery of Americas most famous and deadliest buried treasure. With cursed mountains said to drive men mad and a hidden fortune of gold worth killing for, the treasure hunters greatest danger may be the man at his side. Trust at your own peril if you dare to tread into HISTORYs Legend of the Superstition Mountains.

programme.title: Missing in Alaska
programme.desc: The Alaska Triangle, a region in northwest Alaska, has more unsolved missing person cases than anywhere else in the world. Over 20,000 people have vanished in the past 50 years alone. Who or whats behind these cases is unknown. Some believe its the work of local predators or simply the rugged, dangerous terrain, but legends thrive in Alaska, and the ominous history of disappearances in the area has drawn comparisons to the Bermuda Triangle. Working together with local experts and eyewitnesses, our team of investigators will go case-by-case to gather evidence, conduct tests, examine history and explore local myths to determine the most viable explanation for the disappearances, all while trying to understand the sinister mystery that is the Alaska Triangle.

programme.title: Doomsday: 10 Ways the World Will End
programme.desc: Theories of how the world will meet its end in this doomsday documentary as we follow scientist Trevor S. Valle as he hypothesises with others through the series. Looking into how the human race will be wiped out with each episode examining a different theory of how the planet will be destroyed. From being swallowed by a black hole, bombed by meteorites or overcome by aliens the series covers the most popular theories. An intriguing and interesting watch that will have you questioning how things out of this world could see the end of the earth.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programme.desc: A longtime nurse confesses to helping end the lives of numerous elderly patients at multiple nursing homes; detectives discover this is no angel of mercy; behind her unsuspecting persona lies a ruthless psychopath.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programme.desc: This installment details the murders of James Barnes of Florida. In December 1997, he murdered his wife, Linda Barnes, in Melbourne, Florida. This confession is on audiotape. James Barnes only agreed to confess if Lindas ex-husband, Tony Verzi, was present. In January 1998, James Barnes was sentenced to life in prison for the murder of his wife. The murder of Linda Barnes was not his first murder. On November 1, 2005, at the Columbia Correctional Institution in Florida, James Barnes confessed to the 1988 murder of 41-year-old Patricia Miller. He had raped and killed her and then burned her body on a mattress. This murder had been unsolved for 17 years. In December 2007, Barnes was sentenced to death for the murder of Patricia Miller. The Miller confession is on videotape. As of January 2023, he is still awaiting execution while his case goes through the appeals process.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programme.desc: Evil casts a shadow. That shadow spreads outward for years, even decades, after a crime. It consumes everyone in its path, pulling them into darkness. Can they find the light? Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death explores the endless reach of evil, a reach that extends long after the act of evil itself. This original series highlights the struggle to survive as innocent people find themselves caught in the wake of death and evil.

programme.title: The Price Of Glee
programme.desc: Cast and crew recount the rise of Glee and reveal how sudden stardom and the unrelenting pressure of making a hit show can have tragic consequences.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Allyzibeth Lamont, age 22, who was known as "Ally Lamont" was murdered on October 28, 2019 in the Local No. 9 deli in Johnstown, New York where she had been employed. Her body, buried in a shallow grave, was found by police on October 31, 2019. She had noticed unusual labor law financial dealings by one of the co-owners of the deli, Greek immigrant Georgios Kakavelos, who feared she would report him to the authorities. In the end, both Georgios Kakavelos and Jimmy Duffy (a man Kakavelos hired for $1600 to murder and hide the body) were arrested and charged with her murder. Duffy was sentenced to "18 years to life" in prison. Kakavelos was sentenced to "life in prison without the possibility of parole."

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: On June 14, 2013, 19-year-old Adrienne Salinas and her two roommates are hosting a party at their apartment in Tempe, Arizona. The party is in full swing when Adrienne suddenly decides to leave. She gets in her car, drives away, and never returns home. In the days that follow, her family and friends work side by side with Tempe PD searching for Adrienne. When her body is discovered in a desert river basin, 35 miles awhile from her Tempe home, investigators suspect foul play. When all of their leads become dead ends, the case goes cold. But two years after Adriennes body was discovered, a local man calls Tempe PD with a tip that his best friend, known around town as The Zombie Hunter, could be connected to Adriennes disappearance and mysterious death.

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones
programme.desc: Crime documentary series hosted by Aphrodite Jones who looks into real-life crimes including some of the most atrocious murders of recent times. Jones shares details of these gruesome crimes alongside authentic footage, evidence and interviews with people associated to the case – sometimes even the perpetrator themselves. Subjects featured in the series include such high-profile cases as O. J. Simpson, Michael Jackson, the notorious Zodiac serial killer and the music producer Phil Spector. Jones attempts to get inside the minds of her subjects to better understand their motives for committing such unspeakable crimes. Aphrodite Jones is a true-crime expert, a former crime reporter for FOX News and the author of eight books.

Using their remarkable sense of smell, which is up to 100,000 times more effective than that of humans, these policing pooches unearth deadly narcotics, smuggled goods such as ivory and even illegal immigrants. In this reality series we celebrate these canine crime fighters and the unbreakable bonds they have with their human handlers, showcasing their incredible abilities when out on call with UK police officers.

programme.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programme.desc: When investigators suspect a mothers involvement in the death of her two children, Ranger Jim Holland comes in to unearth the truth.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Investigation Discovery and People magazine partner to re-examine some of the most high profile crime cases in recent history. The one-hour series brings viewers tales of betrayal, buried secrets and unsung heroes, ripped from the pages of one of the nations top weekly magazines. These stories transcended news and became part of pop culture, revealing shocking twists, new evidence, and unexpected resolutions. Interlaced within every episode are exclusive interviews with Peoples journalists, archival footage, re-creations, and firsthand accounts by those closest to the investigations.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: True crime documentary series. In these close-knitted communities, horrific murders have occurred, shaking them to the core. Every episode tells the story of a gruesome murder that happened in a small town. Delve into the heart of the cases through interviews with investigators, family members, prosecutors and neighbours. Various twists and turns can make you question reality, and the final outcome can surprise everyone involved. How well do you know the people next door?

programme.title: Grave Mysteries
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials investigate mysterious deaths across America in this true-crime documentary series, where the evidence and identity of the murderer is linked to online activity. Following a trail of online breadcrumbs, these investigators trawl through victims internet histories to identify any possible clues to their murder. What they find is shocking, and the crime begins to unravel the deeper they dig. With dramatic reconstructions and first-person testimonies, each episode explores a different, heinous crime, one that has ultimately led to a tragic loss of life.

programme.title: Хор
programme.desc: Варвара не оставляет попытки отвести Юру на прослушивание в Хор Грачева. Она приглашает мальчика в Театр Оперетты. После спектакля вдохновленный Юра поет все арии наизусть. Его слышит артист театра Дмитрий Хавьер — второй хормейстер в Хоре Грачева. Дедушка приводит Юру на прослушивание в Хор. Юрино пение вызывает общий хохот. Грачев просит Юру спеть сольную партию "Веселой фуги" с листа, но мальчик не знает нот…

programme.title: Злые люди
programme.desc: 1895 год. Нижний Новгород готовится к крупнейшему торговому событию года — ярмарке. Но в размеренной и благополучной жизни города происходит громкое убийство богатейшего человека — предводителя губернского дворянства Нефедьева. Распутать это дело берётся сотрудник нижегородского сыска Алексей Лыков. Шаг за шагом он сталкивается со злом, выходящим за рамки его понимания. И чтобы его победить, он ставит на кон всё: любовь, честь и даже свою жизнь.

programme.title: Утро
programme.desc: Утренняя новостная программа Настоящего времени.

programme.title: Ждём в гости
programme.desc: В жаркие августовские дни многие жители Грузии выбрали местом отдыха высокогорную Рачу. Мы посетили край живописной природы, чтобы рассказать об интересных местах и увлечениях героев программы. Среди них - винодел, который увлекся архиологией и создал дома целый музей орудий труда людей периода неолита, собранных на берегу реки Риони. Необычны миниатюрные статуэтки уроженца края художника Бесо Кобахидзе, покорившие ценителей марионеток по всему миру. А также в программе - храм II века, построенный в альпийской зоне, и самый известный в Амбролаури кулинар, который готовит все блюда из рачинской ветчины "лори".

programme.title: Два с половиной человека
programme.desc: Закоренелый холостяк Чарли, постоянно опасающийся за свою свободу, и его брат Алан, недавно разошедшийся с женой, живут под одной крышей. Чарли только и делает, что заводит любовные интрижки, а Алан всеми силами пытается от него не отстать. В свободное от амурных приключений время братья воспитывают десятилетнего сынишку Алана Джейка.

programme.title: Два с половиной человека
programme.desc: Закоренелый холостяк Чарли, постоянно опасающийся за свою свободу, и его брат Алан, недавно разошедшийся с женой, живут под одной крышей. Чарли только и делает, что заводит любовные интрижки, а Алан всеми силами пытается от него не отстать. В свободное от амурных приключений время братья воспитывают десятилетнего сынишку Алана Джейка.

programme.title: Тёща-командир
programme.desc: "Катвас" - так за глаза сотрудники агентства недвижимости называют свою грозную начальницу Катерину Васильевну Тихонову, которая никому не дает спуску, в особенности - своему зятю Юрию. Катерина считает, что Юра недостоин ее дочки Гали, и делает все для того, чтобы их развести. Увлеченная работой и семейными проблемами, Катерина даже не замечает, что в нее влюблен ее личный шофер Максим. Но гордость и предубеждение управляют ее чувствами и здесь. Чтобы найти свое счастье и окончательно не разрушить счастье дочери, Катерине придется наступить на горло собственным принципам.

programme.title: Утро
programme.desc: Утренняя новостная программа Настоящего времени.

programme.title: Тёща-командир
programme.desc: "Катвас" - так за глаза сотрудники агентства недвижимости называют свою грозную начальницу Катерину Васильевну Тихонову, которая никому не дает спуску, в особенности - своему зятю Юрию. Чтобы найти свое счастье и окончательно не разрушить счастье дочери, Катерине придется наступить на горло собственным принципам.

programme.title: Ждём в гости
programme.desc: Абсолютное большинство туристов, приезжающих в Грузию, отмечают, что самое ценное для них - это возможность общения. Знаменитое грузинское гостеприимство во многом определяет отношение гостей к стране. Джаба Хвичия - человек, который уверен, что "ни что так не сближает людей, как застолье". Именно за традиционным грузинским столом можно узнать о культуре народа очень многое. И тут, как утверждают, Джабе нет равных.

programme.title: Острое блюдо
programme.desc: Ирина Рублёва собирается отпраздновать свой день рождения в турецком отеле, куда ее семью пригласили друзья — супруги Люда и Борис. Но праздник оказывается испорчен: Ирина узнает, что ее муж Вадим не сможет приехать из-за важных дел… На курорте Ирина знакомится с романтичным турком Керемом, который влюбляется в нее и обещает ждать всю жизнь. Для героини это шанс вырваться из невыносимого брака, где свекровь тиранит ее, а муж — бьет. Но решится ли она на такой отчаянный шаг?

programme.title: Острое блюдо
programme.desc: Ирина Рублёва собирается отпраздновать свой день рождения в турецком отеле, куда ее семью пригласили друзья — супруги Люда и Борис. programme.title: Орёл и решка: 10 лет
programme.desc: Встречайте наших звездных ведущих - Аня Седокова и Коля Серга. Вы столько раз просили вернуть Колю, что мы не могли не прислушаться! И отправили его покорять тропическую Картахену, город солнца, танцев и чудесного побережья Карибского моря. Аню Седокову ждет конная поездка к центру города, встреча с художником Эдуардо Кармона и морские приключения!

programme.title: Провинциальный детектив
programme.desc: Заведующая городской библиотекой Татьяна Дашкова и медсестра Ольга Брянцева живут в небольшом очаровательном городке с древней историей и дружат с детства. Образованность, начитанность и неиссякаемый интерес к жизни Татьяны, в сочетании с практичностью, находчивостью и живостью ума Ольги дают удивительные результаты. Их тандем способен разобраться в самых запутанных ситуациях и выяснить истинные мотивы любого преступления, которых случается немало в этом, кажущемся спокойным, городке. Главное — внимание к мелочам и деталям, а также хорошее знание детективной литературы. Ведь героиням во всех делах помогают Шерлок Холмс, Отец Браун и другие известные детективы из произведений классической литературы.

programme.title: Главное
programme.desc: Ежедневная информационная программа Настоящего времени.

programme.title: Пять минут тишины. Возвращение
programme.desc: Александр Грек, вернувшись после стажировки в Москву и узнав, что его невеста Лина, с которой он собирался окончательно расстаться, беременна, принимает решение жениться на матери своего ребенка. Однако остаться в столице у него не получается: ему уготована служба в отдалённом районе, и он просит направить его назад, в Карелию. Лина решает ехать с ним и там играть свадьбу. Вернувшись в Карелию, Греку предстоит пережить объяснение с Таней, которую он любит, и с Гиреевым, который зол на молодого человека, заставившего страдать его дочь.

programme.title: Гений
programme.desc: Обаятельный и талантливый авантюрист Сергей Ненашев, в прошлом талантливый физик, а ныне — директор овощного магазина, вооружившись электроникой, не оставляет милиции никаких шансов для обвинения в криминале. И даже мафия, которую он ненароком "нагрел" на крупную сумму, попадает впросак, решив ему отомстить.

programme.title: Лицом к событию
programme.desc: Лидер в той или иной сфере общественной жизни - человек известный и информированный - под перекрестным огнем вопросов ведущих программы Михаила Соколова и Елены Рыковцевой.

programme.title: Хор
programme.desc: Юру приняли в Хор! Но Грачев ставит жесткое условие — Юра должен выучить наизусть все партии Хора и освоить сольфеджио. На репетицию Хора приходит телевизионный режиссер Лаптев, любимчик министра культуры. Хор приглашают выступить на концерте "Песня года" с "Песенкой крокодила Гены". Вместо Кеши, Грачев назначает солистом скромного Кузнечика. Но вскоре у Кузнечика начинается возрастная мутация голоса… и солистом становится Юра.

programme.title: Гений
programme.desc: Обаятельный и талантливый авантюрист Сергей Ненашев, в прошлом талантливый физик, а ныне — директор овощного магазина, вооружившись электроникой, не оставляет милиции никаких шансов для обвинения в криминале. programme.title: Ждём в гости
programme.desc: Проект Ирины Хангошвили о культуре, истории и традициях различных стран мира. Ведущий - Зураб Двали - путешествует и приглашает зрителей пройтись вместе с ним по красивым местам, увидеть достопримечательности, полюбоваться природой и познакомиться с интересными людьми. Всюду гостеприимные хозяева говорят нашим телезрителям: "Ждем в гости!" Зрители сначала узнают интересные исторические факты о самых известных или забытых регионах различных стран, и затем останавливаются на кулинарных традициях - готовят несколько блюд с гостями программы.

programme.title: Встречная полоса
programme.desc: Автомобильная авария переворачивает жизнь Крапивиных навсегда. Игорь попадает в больницу с сильной травмой головы, а его жене Любе открывается шокирующая правда. Оказывается, ее любимый муж ей изменяет. Об этом Люба узнает из сообщений, которые приходят на телефон Игоря от его молодой любовницы Ники. Люба оказывается перед серьезным выбором — открыть ли правду об измене мужа семье? Нужно ли признаться любовнице мужа, что Люба в курсе их отношений? И, наконец, как поступить — бороться за жизнь Игоря или бросить его?

programme.title: Встречная полоса
programme.desc: Автомобильная авария переворачивает жизнь Крапивиных навсегда. Игорь попадает в больницу с сильной травмой головы, а его жене Любе открывается шокирующая правда. Оказывается, ее любимый муж ей изменяет. Об этом Люба узнает из сообщений, которые приходят на телефон Игоря от его молодой любовницы Ники. Люба оказывается перед серьезным выбором — открыть ли правду об измене мужа семье? Нужно ли признаться любовнице мужа, что Люба в курсе их отношений? И, наконец, как поступить — бороться за жизнь Игоря или бросить его?

programme.title: Встречная полоса
programme.desc: Автомобильная авария переворачивает жизнь Крапивиных навсегда. Игорь попадает в больницу с сильной травмой головы, а его жене Любе открывается шокирующая правда. И, наконец, как поступить — бороться за жизнь Игоря или бросить его?

programme.title: Орел и Решка. 10 лет
programme.desc: В опасный и одновременно прекрасный город Медельин, Колумбия вас проведут фронтвумен группы The Hardkiss - Юлия Санина и певец ALEKSEEV. Наш очаровательный тандем прилетел в Колумбию, в некогда империю Пабло Эскобара. Имя, которое известно многим. И нам удалось снять уникальный материал - взять интервью у его брата! Кроме обычных развлечений - полетов на вертолете, экстримального спуска в водопад и дорогих отелей в Колумбии Орел и решка покажут путанные улицы и трущобы. А также запечатлеем наше имя на одной из местных стен.

programme.title: Провинциальный детектив
programme.desc: Заведующая городской библиотекой Татьяна Дашкова и медсестра Ольга Брянцева живут в небольшом очаровательном городке с древней историей и дружат с детства. Образованность, начитанность и неиссякаемый интерес к жизни Татьяны, в сочетании с практичностью, находчивостью и живостью ума Ольги дают удивительные результаты. Их тандем способен разобраться в самых запутанных ситуациях и выяснить истинные мотивы любого преступления, которых случается немало в этом, кажущемся спокойным, городке. Главное — внимание к мелочам и деталям, а также хорошее знание детективной литературы. Ведь героиням во всех делах помогают Шерлок Холмс, Отец Браун и другие известные детективы из произведений классической литературы.

programme.title: Главное
programme.desc: Ежедневная информационная программа Настоящего времени.

programme.title: Пять минут тишины. Возвращение
programme.desc: Александр Грек, вернувшись после стажировки в Москву и узнав, что его невеста Лина, с которой он собирался окончательно расстаться, беременна, принимает решение жениться на матери своего ребенка. Однако остаться в столице у него не получается: ему уготована служба в отдалённом районе, и он просит направить его назад, в Карелию. Лина решает ехать с ним и там играть свадьбу. Вернувшись в Карелию, Греку предстоит пережить объяснение с Таней, которую он любит, и с Гиреевым, который зол на молодого человека, заставившего страдать его дочь.

programme.title: Гений
programme.desc: Обаятельный и талантливый авантюрист Сергей Ненашев, в прошлом талантливый физик, а ныне — директор овощного магазина, вооружившись электроникой, не оставляет милиции никаких шансов для обвинения в криминале. И даже мафия, которую он ненароком "нагрел" на крупную сумму, попадает впросак, решив ему отомстить.

programme.title: Лицом к событию
programme.desc: Лидер в той или иной сфере общественной жизни - человек известный и информированный - под перекрестным огнем вопросов ведущих программы Михаила Соколова и Елены Рыковцевой.

programme.title: Хор
programme.desc: 1972 год. Однажды услышав песни Робертино Лоретти, 12-летний школьник из Люберец Юра тоже начинает петь. Сначала он стесняется этого, ведь пение, по мнению его сверстников и некоторых взрослых, — совсем не мужское занятие. Но, благодаря наставничеству молодой учительницы музыки Варвары, Юра развивает свой талант и решается пройти прослушивание в хор Грачева. У руководителя хора есть всего месяц, чтобы расширить состав исполнителей и подготовить новую программу для участия в телефестивале "Песня года".

programme.title: Гений
programme.desc: Обаятельный и талантливый авантюрист Сергей Ненашев, в прошлом талантливый физик, а ныне — директор овощного магазина, вооружившись электроникой, не оставляет милиции никаких шансов для обвинения в криминале. programme.title: Heidija
programme.desc: Heidija ir maza meitene ar lieliem sapņiem. Viņa Šveices alpos, dzīvojot ar vectēvu,saskaras ar daudzām problēmām. Heidija iepriecina un nomierina cilvēkus un dzīvniekus viņas tuvumā, ar savu entuziasmu, dāsnumu un burvīgo dzīvesprieku. Šī jaunā bārene.

programme.title: Leo pasaule
programme.desc: Leo pasaule ir godalgots itāļu multfilmu seriāls, kas galvenokārt paredzēts bērniem ar autisma spektra traucējumiem, taču vienlaikus piemērots visiem pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem. Māksliniecisks iestudējums, kas īpaši izstrādāts, lai aktīvi un tiešā veidā sazinātos ar tiem, kam ir grūtības koncentrēties un mācīties, lai nojauktu arvien plašākas invaliditātes barjeras. Pasaules Autisma izpratnes diena ir 2.aprīlī.

programme.title: Leo pasaule
