programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: In this crowded and chaotic household, Lincoln Loud is the only boy among his ten sisters. With eleven children under one roof, things get a little bit crazy sometimes, to say the least. This childrens cartoon is fun and light-hearted, and Clyde, Lincolns best friend, only adds to that. Clyde is an only child by contrast, and is jealous of Lincolns abundance of siblings. Clyde also has a massive crush on Lori, who is Lincolns oldest sister. However, she has a boyfriend, Bobby. Bobby, although not being particularly intelligent, has several different jobs, ranging from life guard, to security at a shopping centre.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Jade realizes being a good dancer in real life is very different to being a good dancer on a computer game. Hope shows her how its done, meaning she tops a leader board and wins a visit from famous gamer Mr Best for a dance off in person. Jade tries to withdraw, but Mr Best calls her a chicken which makes her determined to beat him! Training with Hope begins, and Jades ready for battle, but Mr Best doesnt play fair and ends up winning! Disappointed, Jade challenges Mr Best to a real dance battle which she wins. // Jade signs herself and Mica up to hopefully win the "Young Explorers" prize - a holiday for all their friends. Jade has suggested they put on a play that will be judged by Professor Lopez, but Mica has stage fright. The Marsups help with rehearsals, but when show day arrives the twins forget the script, and an essential prop. The Marsupilamis step up to save the day, and an awesome performance is delivered, that impresses Professor Lopez so much that he awards the school the prize.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Without seeing him, the Star family obliviously smashes up Plankton, leading him to forget who he is. When the injured, amnesic Plankton is saved and adopted by the Dartfish family, it does not take long for him to teach the overly polite family his evil ways. Meanwhile, Karen searches all over town for her missing husband.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: In this crowded and chaotic household, Lincoln Loud is the only boy among his ten sisters. programme.title: Wylde Pak

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Tired of SpongeBobs chaotic driving, Mrs. Puff sends him away to Klopnod on an exchange student driver program. In return, she receives Peppercorn, a sea-mule, who is an excellent driver! Meanwhile, SpongeBob learns that his frenzied driving skills are perfectly suited for the Klopnodian roads (where only farm animals are allowed to drive). However, SpongeBobs newfound Klopnodian driving skills do not translate well upon returning to Bikini Bottom. // Slappy becomes a waiter at the Krusty Krab but scares off customers with his creepy demeanor. He promises Mr. Krabs that his monster friends will be coming to dine that night. Later, the restaurant is packed with monsters and Krabs is thrilled! However, Nosferatu arrives and begs Slappy to return as his servant. Slappy agrees, to Mr. Krabs disappointment - he loved the business the monsters brought in! In the end, however, he realizes that monsters pay in bugs, not cash!

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: When the family teases Halmoni about being helpless with technology, she vows to become a tech master and show them all whos really in charge. As she ascends to Master Hacker status, she messes with everyones most precious online usage. She scams Will to drain his bank account, destroys Mins e-calendar, bans Lily from playing WAtR, and steals Jacks files from the cloud. Can the Wylde-Paks take down Halmoni and save their internet? // Schools just around the corner, but Lil hasnt even started her summer reading! Unable to find her book, Jack suggests she check out a copy at the local library... library... library... why does the word alone fill Lily with mysterious dread? Out of options, she faces the evil library, Jack at her side-until hes swept up by a mob of book fans. Lily must traverse the labyrinthian library solo, while Jack gets trapped in its catacombs. Will the kids escape? And can Lil make a psychological breakthrough to overcome her library fears?

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Will and Min have a date night, a rare event since becoming parents and business owners. Theyre determined to live it up like when they were young. But everything about the date is awful, so they head home-until their rideshare driver drags them into a high-stakes turf war with a rival app. The attempt to keep their youthful mystique alive becomes a battle to keep themselves alive! Meanwhile, Jack and Lil stay home alone to prove they dont need a babysitter. But when Halmoni throws a house party, the kids struggle to keep the house intact. // In this Behind the Music style documentary, the new Groom and Board jingle tops music charts, turning the family into a famous jingle band! But the fame goes to their heads, and the band breaks up. Diva Min goes solo; Jack and his guru (Chuck) go on a disastrous spiritual journey; Lil gets caught up in overselling merch; Halmoni obsesses over looking young again; and Will totally sells out. Can they put aside their petty artistic differences and get the band back together?

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob SquarePants is a cartoon series starring the yellow sea sponge Spongebob who lives deep in the ocean in the underwater town called Bikini Bottom. Together with his buddy the pink starfish Patrick, he experiences the craziest and most exciting adventures. Spongebob has a very energetic and optimistic character and works as a chef in restaurant "The Krusty Krab" where he makes the best burgers of the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Jade realizes being a good dancer in real life is very different to being a good dancer on a computer game. Hope shows her how its done, meaning she tops a leader board and wins a visit from famous gamer Mr Best for a dance off in person. Jade tries to withdraw, but Mr Best calls her a chicken which makes her determined to beat him! Training with Hope begins, and Jades ready for battle, but Mr Best doesnt play fair and ends up winning! Disappointed, Jade challenges Mr Best to a real dance battle which she wins. // Jade signs herself and Mica up to hopefully win the "Young Explorers" prize - a holiday for all their friends. Jade has suggested they put on a play that will be judged by Professor Lopez, but Mica has stage fright. The Marsups help with rehearsals, but when show day arrives the twins forget the script, and an essential prop. The Marsupilamis step up to save the day, and an awesome performance is delivered, that impresses Professor Lopez so much that he awards the school the prize.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Lunch service at the school canteen is slow and Jade leads a chant to speed up the service. The the chef is offended and quits, and things then get worse as Marcel is hired, and his disgusting food quickly generates resentment towards Jade. With the help of the Marsups the old chef returns, and is so appalled by the food that she reclaims her job.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: In this crowded and chaotic household, Lincoln Loud is the only boy among his ten sisters. With eleven children under one roof, things get a little bit crazy sometimes, to say the least. This childrens cartoon is fun and light-hearted, and Clyde, Lincolns best friend, only adds to that. Clyde is an only child by contrast, and is jealous of Lincolns abundance of siblings. Clyde also has a massive crush on Lori, who is Lincolns oldest sister. However, she has a boyfriend, Bobby. Bobby, although not being particularly intelligent, has several different jobs, ranging from life guard, to security at a shopping centre.

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay
programme.desc: Phone avatar Lay Lay is the perfect hype girl and best friend that anyone could ever want from their personal affirmation app. Struggling to make her mark at school and needing a best friend to talk to, Sadie wishes upon a star that Lay Lay was real and could help teach her how to stand out. When her wish comes true and Lay Lay is magically brought to life, the two friends learn that when they are together, they can accomplish anything.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: New adventures for The Thundermans unfold after Phoebe and Max are sent undercover to handle a new threat in the seaside town of Secret Shores, and bring Chloe along to develop her superhero talent. While they investigate suspicious activity coming from the local school, Chloe forms a bond with two classmates, who dont realize their new friend has secret powers. As the danger increases, the Thunderman trio must stay in town indefinitely, leaving the squabbling twins in charge of raising their younger sister.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry Danger is a story about adventures of a 13-year-old Henry Hart who is lucky to become a helpmate of a super hero Captain Man. This is a real dream job of every teen. The newbie is getting paid for fighting against crime and helping to save the world. Brave Henry must hide his job from his family and friends and it is not that simple, but nothing can stop him from being a true crime-fighter. Henry himself wants to become a super hero one day, that is why he is constantly learning from Captain Man and is not scared of any hardships on the way to his dream.

programme.title: Henry Danger

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: This fun spin-off of Henry Danger is set in the Swellview Academy for the Gifted and follows the adventures of four young friends. Chapa, Miles, Bose and Mika were ordinary kids, until they discovered they have superpowers. They are recruited by Captain Man to become his new crime-fighting crew, and protect the city of Swellview from various villains. But before that Captain Man must teach them how to control their superpowers, as well as to how to work as a team, using Schwoz as his helper.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iCarly is about teenager Carly who produces her own web show named iCarly along with her three friends Freddie, Sam and Gibby. The show is broadcasted from a studio Carly constructed in the flat where she lives with her 29 years old brother and guardian Spencer. While producing a webshow Carly is not looking for fame or fortune. Ideally she wants to be a role model for children and teenagers. iCarly ultimately features everything from comedy sketches and talent contests to interviews, recipes, and problem-solving.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Sitcom about a girl named Tori Vega, who navigates life at an elite Hollywood performing arts high school. It is Sikowitzs tenth anniversary at Hollywood Arts, so Tori and the gang celebrate by taking him to a play. But things go wrong when Sikowitz becomes depressed after the show. Trina tries to impress a boy she likes by pretending to be a pizza delivery girl, and Beck and Jade start text-fighting.

programme.title: Sam and Cat
programme.desc: Prepare to meet the strangest match made in bestie heaven -- Sam and Cat! Sams loud, independent, and tough as nails, while Cat is sweet as pie and super flighty. But that doesnt stop this unlikely pair from becoming best buds and roomies! Together, theyre a power duo with a love for fun and adventure -- its just too bad that it doesnt come cheap. A booming out-of-home babysitting business quickly becomes the answer to their empty-pocket problems, but also an extra reason for countless wacky adventures to come!

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leo, Raph, Donnie and Mikey emerge from the sewers to face challenges alongside April ONeil like never before. When trouble oozes into the streets of New York City, the team finds themselves up against Mechazoids, street gangs, and even the storm of the century! No matter the obstacle, these heroes in a half shell are ready for action with heart and a whole lot of humor.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: After reading a book by the Twins parents, Bibi learns about Marsupilamis and decides she wants one. The Twins deny Marsupilamis exist, but Bibis convinced they have their own, so starts spying on them. Jade claims a tail that Bibi spots is just a hose, but Bibi wants proof. So Mica sends the Marsupilamis to fetch one-they try to steal Rosas hose but it ends up getting lost, and whilst hunting for it Twister mistakes a Jaguars tail for the hose. The Jaguar then follows them back home where they manage to trap it in their nest, where Bibi encounters it thinking its a Marsup! Scared she declares shes sticking to Puppies in the future. // Lunch service at the school canteen is slow and Jade leads a chant to speed up the service. programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester are a pair of hilariously individual twins who live in a weird and wonderful alternate reality where your neighbour could be a pair of disgruntled trousers or your best friend a floating cloud of bottom burp. But, unlike their friends and neighbours, Best and Bester have the unique ability to choose a new body every single day and, in doing so, experience life in a completely different way.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Gullible Pants: SpongeBob is left in charge of the Krusty Krab while Mr. Krabs steps out for 15 minutes, and he is determined to make it the best-managed 15 minutes ever! So when Squidward tells him that there are a lot of rules that he doesnt know about-like never interrupting Squidwards naps-SpongeBob is eager to learn and follow everything he says. Overbooked: SpongeBobs got a full day, and hes determined to do everything hes scheduled to do: help fix Mr. Krabs telescope, go to Patricks birthday party, and help with Sandys science presentation. Too bad everythings scheduled for the same exact time!

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leo, Raph, Donnie and Mikey emerge from the sewers to face challenges alongside April ONeil like never before. When trouble oozes into the streets of New York City, the team finds themselves up against Mechazoids, street gangs, and even the storm of the century! No matter the obstacle, these heroes in a half shell are ready for action with heart and a whole lot of humor.

programme.title: Harvey Beaks
programme.desc: Harvey Beaks is a good kid on a mission to have fun, and nothing can stand in his way! Well, except for the fact that he irons his bed sheets and is always on time. Will his best friends, Fee and Foo, be able to help Harvey tap into his wild side? From fighting a gang of squirrels to stealing bikes from Randl the grumpy raccoon, there are tons of adventures to be had in Bigbark Woods. Harvey, Fee and Foo are ready to cause some trouble and have a blast along the way.

programme.title: Wallykazam!
programme.desc: When Ginas picnic is rained out, Wally decides to cheer her up by throwing a surprise picnic! Hell need his friends to keep her distracted and his magic stick to create H words that will help make the picnic happen!

programme.title: Winx Club
programme.desc: Meet Bloom, a girl from Earth, who after she finds out that she is a fairy joins Alfea College on the planet Magix- a magical universe that is inhabited by fairies, witches and other mythical creatures. At Alfea College, fairy warriors from all over the universe study to improve their supernatural powers and here Bloom befriends five other fairies - Stella, the fairy of the Sun, Flora, the fairy of nature, Tecna, the fairy of technology, Musa, the fairy of music and Aisha, the fairy of waves. Together, this group of girls known as the Winx, become best friends and the force to be reckoned with as they experience incredible adventures while defending their universe from varous enemies.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Deep down in the Pacific Ocean in the subterranean city of Bikini Bottom lives a square yellow sponge named SpongeBob SquarePants. SpongeBob lives in a pineapple with his pet snail, Gary, loves his job as a fry cook at the Krusty Krab, and has a knack for getting into all kinds of trouble without really trying. When hes not getting on the nerves of his cranky next door neighbor Squidward, SpongeBob can usually be found smack in the middle of all sorts of strange situations with his best buddy, the simple yet lovable starfish, Patrick, or his thrill-seeking surfer-girl squirrel pal, Sandy Cheeks.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: Family-orientated cartoon for kids. Ronnie Anne Santiago, her big brother Bobby and their mum have recently moved to Great Lakes City and are now getting used to life in this busy, and sometimes chaotic, new town. Here in the big city they meet the Casagrandes – their extended family made up of grandparents, aunt, uncle, cousins and their pets. Along with a bunch of friends they all live as one big happy family. Skateboarding Ronnie Anne also starts to explore what their new hometown has to offer. Meanwhile, Bobby helps his grandfather Hector working in the family store where they meet lots of interesting characters from the neighbourhood.

Clyde is an only child by contrast, and is jealous of Lincolns abundance of siblings. Clyde also has a massive crush on Lori, who is Lincolns oldest sister. However, she has a boyfriend, Bobby. Bobby, although not being particularly intelligent, has several different jobs, ranging from life guard, to security at a shopping centre.

Timmys greenness in making his wishes causes troubles and he has to "unwish" them together with his fairy godparents to avoid possible disasters. Enjoy Timmys fantastic adventures in the world of fairies, dragons, unicorns and dwarfs.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Welcome to the Patrick Star Show hosted by Patrick himself and revolving around his extraordinary family and his own bizzare fantasies. Get to know his family, his Dad Cecil Star, his Mom Bunny Star, his sister Squidina Star, and GrandPat Star, and find out where his charm and eccentricity come from.

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The Penguins of Madagascar is an American animated television series, a spin-off of the Madagascar films. The main characters are penguins-commandoes: Skipper, Rico, Kowalski, and Private. They pretend to be white and fluffy but in reality are fearless adrenaline addicts and a secret spy team on a mission to protect their home in the Central Park Zoo. The penguins often have to deal with problems caused by their zoo lemur neighbors- King Julien XIII, Maurice and Mort. The penguins thwart any attempts of King Julien XIII to wield the sceptre of the Zoo.

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Kowalskis obsession with Doris the dolphin drives him to invent a love ray, the Love-U-Laser. It works like a charm until Alice falls for a trashcan, Julien falls for Mort, and Skipper orders the ray to be put in reverse. Private gets hit by the reverse ray and instantly loathes Kowalski. Matters get much worse as the loathe ray explodes and everybody hates Kowalski! Hes only got one shot to stop being the most loathed penguin in the world. // Told as a courtroom flashback, Kowalski unwisely revives Jiggles in a small, whipped cream-eating version. The little green cubes multiply on impact, however, and are soon threatening to cover the surface of the earth. As the Jiggli multiply out of control, will the team be able to prevent the jiggli-fication of the world?

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Ray Fillet is attacked in Central Park by a mutant turtle! Donnies busy with his robotics project: turning Metalhead into a spider-bot. Wingnut bursts in and tells the Turtles to come quick- Ray is hurt! A woozy Ray blames the Ninja Turtles, and the Mutanimals start a fight with the confused brothers. But when Rays REAL attacker appears, a mutant snapping turtle named TOKKA, he fights everyone... until his watch starts beeping and he escapes. The Turtles tail him, ending up on the Staten Island ferry. After a big fight, Tokkas trapped. But while questioning him, Tokka explodes into OOZE, leaving only a baby turtle and his watch. Donnies brothers ask him to hack it and find clues about Tokka, which he says is impossible! Later, Donnie gets a location pin from Wingnut and follows it to an abandoned factory on Staten Island. He finds her and ANOTHER TOKKA that he cleverly takes out! Donnie thinks theyre safe until MORE Monster Mutanimals emerge! Could Donnies day get any worse?

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger
programme.desc: Henry Hart is a normal eighth grade student, with an out of school job that takes him on amazing adventures. His cool part time gig as Kid Danger, takes him on out of this world adventures as the sidekick-in-training to famous superhero Captain Man. They go on bizarre and crazy travels, battling criminals and villains that try to attack his hometown and Captain Man himself. Meanwhile at home, Henry has to stay in hiding, keeping his sidekick job as a secret from his best friends, Charlotte and Jasper, and little sister Piper. What exciting adventures will Kid Danger get up to with Captain Man and will be he be able to hide his alter ego from his friends and family?

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: No Hat for Pat: Patrick is sick of all of his friends not being able to play with him because they have to put on their Krusty Krab hats and go to work. So when Mr. Krabs offers him a job as a sign-holder, Patrick is thrilled because it means he gets to wear a hat and work with all his friends! But Pat soon learns that wearing a hat isnt as simple as it looks. Toy Store of Doom: A new toy store has opened up in Bikini Bottom, and SpongeBob and Patrick couldnt be happier! In fact, they are having so much fun at the toy store that they accidentally get locked in when it closes. They soon find out that things are a lot different at the toy store when no ones around...

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: A friendly day at the beach turns into all-out war in Sand Castles In The Sand, and then in Shell Shocked, an accident-prone SpongeBob damages Garys shell, and must find a replacement. 11:01 Rock, Paper, Scissors Rock, Paper and Scissors are three best friends who share an apartment together and compete over everything. Week to week, they have tiny problems that always get out of hand. (Subtitled)

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leo, Raph, Donnie and Mikey emerge from the sewers to face challenges alongside April ONeil like never before. When trouble oozes into the streets of New York City, the team finds themselves up against Mechazoids, street gangs, and even the storm of the century! No matter the obstacle, these heroes in a half shell are ready for action with heart and a whole lot of humor.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Lagoonas creative vision is ignored by other monsters as they make a movie for the Monster High Film Festival. // Frustrated at her classmates, Toralei and her band release earworms that control everyones thoughts.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester are a pair of hilariously individual twins who live in a weird and wonderful alternate reality where your neighbour could be a pair of disgruntled trousers or your best friend a floating cloud of bottom burp. But, unlike their friends and neighbours, Best and Bester have the unique ability to choose a new body every single day and, in doing so, experience life in a completely different way.

programme.title: Nella the Princess Knight
programme.desc: Nella the Princess Knight is a British-American animated childrens television series that follows adventurous life of fun-loving and fearless princess Nella who turns into a knight when necessary in order to protect her kingdom. Her main treasure is not her crown but her beloved friends- unicorn Trinket, steed Clod and Sir Garrett. Nella sees that no harm comes to her friends and all other citizens of her kingdom. Together with her friends they have fun, solve mysteries and overcome hardships without which life is impossible even in the happiest kingdom.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Action-packed animation. Four pizza-loving brothers, Raph, Leo, Donnie and Mikey, are mutant turtles who live in the sewers under the streets of New York City. Raph is the oldest of the brothers and also their leader. Leo is the sword-swinging trickster of the team. Donnie is the smartest of the group and Mikey is the youngest brother and also the joker of the bunch. The adventures they go on help them discover their mystic ninja powers and understand the world around them. They learn to work better as a team of heroes. Skills they will need when faced with the enemies who wish to defeat the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles.

programme.title: T.U.F.F. Puppy
programme.desc: Chilly Dog:Things get frosty when Dudley and Kittys latest secret mission requires that the crime-fighting duo go undercover as ice skaters after the worlds greatest figure skaters are kidnapped. And to get in, it will involve some crossdressing...The Doomies:Disguised as super villains, Dudley and Kitty attend the "Doomie Awards," an award show in which villains show off some of their pesky and evil moves. Once again, its up to the fearless heroes to foil each crime before their identities are discovered.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang and his friends go to a Fire Nation town so that Aang can witness some firebending, their plan soon goes awry when its discovered that he is the Avatar. Fortunately, hes rescued by an individual who serves a firebending master named Jeong Jeong who has abandoned the Fire Nation, so Aang attempts to use this time to attempt to learn how to firebend. However, when the firebending master refuses to even see Aang, will Aang be able to prove hes ready to learn how to firebend despite the fact that he lacks discipline?

programme.title: Kamp Koral
programme.desc: A prequel to SpongeBob SquarePants, featuring the beloved characters as children, spending their summertime at Camp Coral having fun doing typical camp activities like building campfires, catching jellyfish, and swimming in Lake Yuckymuck, causing a bit of trouble and chaos on the side. SpongeBob SquarePants is a ten-year-old with a red cap, goofy and friendly as hes always been. Lets not forget SpongeBobs friends, Patrick, Sandy, and Squidward, whos a bit older than the others and works as a junior counselor. All other characters such as Mr. Krabs, Mrs. Puff, SpongeBobs nemesis Plankton, and Karen are a part of this adventure as well.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: Family-orientated cartoon for kids. Ronnie Anne Santiago, her big brother Bobby and their mum have recently moved to Great Lakes City and are now getting used to life in this busy, and sometimes chaotic, new town. Here in the big city they meet the Casagrandes – their extended family made up of grandparents, aunt, uncle, cousins and their pets. Along with a bunch of friends they all live as one big happy family. Skateboarding Ronnie Anne also starts to explore what their new hometown has to offer. Meanwhile, Bobby helps his grandfather Hector working in the family store where they meet lots of interesting characters from the neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: Family-orientated cartoon for kids. Ronnie Anne Santiago, her big brother Bobby and their mum have recently moved to Great Lakes City and are now getting used to life in this busy, and sometimes chaotic, new town. Here in the big city they meet the Casagrandes – their extended family made up of grandparents, aunt, uncle, cousins and their pets. Along with a bunch of friends they all live as one big happy family. Skateboarding Ronnie Anne also starts to explore what their new hometown has to offer. Meanwhile, Bobby helps his grandfather Hector working in the family store where they meet lots of interesting characters from the neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lana learns her favourite fish are in jeopardy in Scales of Justice, then in Crimes of Fashion, Leni gets fired from her job, so Lincoln and Clyde (as Ace and Jack) take on the case. ) 17:00 Rock, Paper, Scissors Rock, Paper and Scissors are three best friends who share an apartment together and compete over everything. Week to week, they have tiny problems that always get out of hand. (Subtitled) 17:15 Rock, Paper, Scissors Rock, Paper and Scissors are three best friends who share an apartment together and compete over everything. Week to week, they have tiny problems that always get out of hand. (Subtitled)

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: In this crowded and chaotic household, Lincoln Loud is the only boy among his ten sisters. With eleven children under one roof, things get a little bit crazy sometimes, to say the least. This childrens cartoon is fun and light-hearted, and Clyde, Lincolns best friend, only adds to that. Clyde is an only child by contrast, and is jealous of Lincolns abundance of siblings. Clyde also has a massive crush on Lori, who is Lincolns oldest sister. However, she has a boyfriend, Bobby. Bobby, although not being particularly intelligent, has several different jobs, ranging from life guard, to security at a shopping centre.

programme.title: Pinky Malinky
programme.desc: Ashamed of a guilty-pleasure TV show hes addicted to, Pinky decides to keep his viewing a secret. // Pinky is shocked to learn that JJ cant handle scary movies, so he plans to help him get over his fears by repeatedly frightening him.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The Fairly OddParents tells us a story of Timmy Turner, a 10-year-old boy in the fictional town of Dimmsdale. Vicky is his babysitter with vicious temper. His parents are completely indifferent to him. His life is very sad and hopeless until his fairy godparents Wanda and Cosmo apperar in the fishbowl and try to fulfill his every wish. Timmys greenness in making his wishes causes troubles and he has to "unwish" them together with his fairy godparents to avoid possible disasters. Enjoy Timmys fantastic adventures in the world of fairies, dragons, unicorns and dwarfs.

programme.title: Kamp Koral
programme.desc: A prequel to SpongeBob SquarePants, featuring the beloved characters as children, spending their summertime at Camp Coral having fun doing typical camp activities like building campfires, catching jellyfish, and swimming in Lake Yuckymuck, causing a bit of trouble and chaos on the side. SpongeBob SquarePants is a ten-year-old with a red cap, goofy and friendly as hes always been. Lets not forget SpongeBobs friends, Patrick, Sandy, and Squidward, whos a bit older than the others and works as a junior counselor. All other characters such as Mr. Krabs, Mrs. Puff, SpongeBobs nemesis Plankton, and Karen are a part of this adventure as well.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob SquarePants is a cartoon series starring the yellow sea sponge Spongebob who lives deep in the ocean in the underwater town called Bikini Bottom. Together with his buddy the pink starfish Patrick, he experiences the craziest and most exciting adventures. Spongebob has a very energetic and optimistic character and works as a chef in restaurant "The Krusty Krab" where he makes the best burgers of the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Welcome to the Patrick Star Show hosted by Patrick himself and revolving around his extraordinary family and his own bizzare fantasies. Get to know his family, his Dad Cecil Star, his Mom Bunny Star, his sister Squidina Star, and GrandPat Star, and find out where his charm and eccentricity come from.

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The Commissioner flips his lid, literally. His toupee blows off and sticks to Maurice, who also gets red cheeks and a skinned tail, all by accident. Julien and Mort chase him with sticks, intent on beating the "monster" stuck to Maurices head. The baboon ladies take Maurice in, protecting and pampering him because they mistakenly think hes a male baboon. Its up to the penguins to get the toupee back and restore it to its rightful scalp. // Shelly the ostrich gets stuck in drying cement and only Rico can save her. Shelly falls for him hard as a result, however, Ricos heart forever belongs to his doll. Shelly swipes the doll and tries hard to win his heart, but Rico doesnt budge and his doll is accidently hauled off in a recycle truck. The penguins give chase but are left hopelessly in the dust. Shelly, wanting to make amends, tosses them on her back and sprints after the truck - can she possibly catch it?

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The Penguins of Madagascar is an American animated television series, a spin-off of the Madagascar films. The main characters are penguins-commandoes: Skipper, Rico, Kowalski, and Private. They pretend to be white and fluffy but in reality are fearless adrenaline addicts and a secret spy team on a mission to protect their home in the Central Park Zoo. The penguins often have to deal with problems caused by their zoo lemur neighbors- King Julien XIII, Maurice and Mort. The penguins thwart any attempts of King Julien XIII to wield the sceptre of the Zoo.

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: "HALF-HOUR SUMMER VACATION SPECIAL The penguins worst nightmare has come true. After a sailing trip gone wrong they wind up in the Hoboken Zoo. Strangely, the animals are happy, the zoo is a paradise, and life couldnt be better! Zookeeper Frances takes outstanding care of all of them or does she? Something sinister bubbles under the surface the happy animals are actually androids, and the real animals are held captive in a dungeon. Theyre too messy and Zookeeper Frances cant stand a mess! A rescue comes from a very unlikely source, and the final battle could go either way!"

programme.title: Pinky Malinky
programme.desc: Pinky Malinky, a 12-year-old Middle School student, just so happens to be an anthropomorphic hot dog, who endeavors to climb up the social ladder with his two human friends, Babs Buttman and JJ Jameson.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Deep down in the Pacific Ocean in the subterranean city of Bikini Bottom lives a square yellow sponge named SpongeBob SquarePants. SpongeBob lives in a pineapple with his pet snail, Gary, loves his job as a fry cook at the Krusty Krab, and has a knack for getting into all kinds of trouble without really trying. When hes not getting on the nerves of his cranky next door neighbor Squidward, SpongeBob can usually be found smack in the middle of all sorts of strange situations with his best buddy, the simple yet lovable starfish, Patrick, or his thrill-seeking surfer-girl squirrel pal, Sandy Cheeks.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Donnies trapped in a mad scientists lab by the Monster Mutanimals Tokka, Rahzar, Scale Tail, Antrax and Wyrm who are after Wingnuts blood. Meanwhile, Leo, Mikey and Raph try to get pizza but the shop owner is furious: theyve made a mess of the place too many times! But the Turtles have never been there before! Theyre confused until another Tokka wrecks the place in a huge fight before exploding into ooze...and then another Tokka arrives! In the lab, Donnie plans his escape but stumbles upon a video of Rahzar who explains the Monster Mutanimals are doomed unless they find the blood of a stable mutant... and they need Donatellos help! A real-life Rahzar lunges at Donnie, who fights him off until a whole pack of Monster Mutants shows up. The other three Turtles track their Tokka to the lab but are quickly captured. Donnie can only watch as his brothers are shoved into cages... and confronted by the creator of the Monster Mutanimals, the mad scientist Jordan Perry!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish
programme.desc: On a fairy family trip to Fairy World, Dev convinces Hazel to steal Peris wand and explore Fairy World. Cosmo, Wanda and Peri sneak into Jorgens office and use his tracker to find them. Hazel and Dev end up stuck in the Un-Wish Zone, trapped by the Un-wish Dragon. Together they must battle the dragon and find their way back to their fairies before Jorgen finds out! // When band and orchestra tryouts happen at school, Hazel finds herself stuck in the middle of a rivalry between the two. Rather than choose a side, she wishes to be good at all instruments and ends up in both. Exhausted from the double life shes living, she wishes that the band and orchestra had nothing to be rivals about. In granting the wish, Cosmo and Wanda get rid of all music on Earth. Hazel, with the help of the Nmusic Phairy (silent N), must restore music to Earth and end this rivalry once and for all!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: House Fancy: Squidward is enraged when he sees the home of his rival, Squilliam featured on a TV show about fancy houses. Determined not to be outdone, Squidward arranges to have his own house on the program. But he quickly realizes that his house isnt exactly camera-ready and hes going to need a lot of help, even if it means letting SpongeBob redecorate. Krabby Road: When SpongeBob mistakenly thinks that Plankton is starting a band, Plankton decides to use this to advantage. He soon forms a rock band with SpongeBob, Patrick, and Squidward. Planktons plan: get SpongeBob to write a song about the secret Krabby Patty formula!

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger
programme.desc: Henry Hart is a normal eighth grade student, with an out of school job that takes him on amazing adventures. His cool part time gig as Kid Danger, takes him on out of this world adventures as the sidekick-in-training to famous superhero Captain Man. They go on bizarre and crazy travels, battling criminals and villains that try to attack his hometown and Captain Man himself. Meanwhile at home, Henry has to stay in hiding, keeping his sidekick job as a secret from his best friends, Charlotte and Jasper, and little sister Piper. What exciting adventures will Kid Danger get up to with Captain Man and will be he be able to hide his alter ego from his friends and family?

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The zoosters think King Julien has caused sweet old lady Gladys to slip and hurt herself, thus cutting off the special treats she brings for them. The rush to judgment condemns the protesting lemur to a mighty swat from the Rump Whomper. As the clock winds down to his unspeakable punishment only one abstains - Skippers gut inexplicably insists that King Julien is innocent. You should know better than to go against your gut. // Kowalskis dream of attending the giant invention expo INVEXPO have to be put on hold when hes laid up with broken legs. Skipper and the rest of the gang go in his place with the promise to bring him a full report. The injured bird goes stir crazy locked away in the hospital, however, and hallucinates that a dangerous Space Squid is invading! Could this be more than the fevered imaginings of the caged bird?

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Po the Panda trains, battles, learns, teaches, stumbles, gabs and ""geeks out"" as the newest hero in the Valley of Peace. Now living in his permanent home at the Jade Palace with the rest of the Furious Five, Po will have to take on new responsibilities and face brand-new adversaries (not seen in the movies) in his continuing education as the Dragon Warrior...for being the Dragon Warrior is not a destination, its a journey (unfortunately for Po, that journey is uphill).

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: In New Jersey, the Good Grief community focuses on a holistic way of dealing with grief, where children can give in to rage in the volcano room, and say goodbye to a dying teddy bear patient in the hospital room. Over the course of a year, we follow the weekly meetings and get close to Kimmy, Nicky, Peter, Nora, Nolan, and Mikayla and their close companion: grief. It is sometimes heartbreaking, but also humorous, to experience the questions about life and death through their open and curious minds. Grief is high and heavy as a mountain, but it helps you understand what has happened, and that death is irreversible.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Chum Bucket Supreme: None of Planktons intellectually advanced advertising slogans for the Chum Bucket seem to be working. Plankton decides to switch gears by hiring someone who can create the dumbest slogans ever-Patrick! Single Cell Anniversary: Its Karen and Planktons wedding anniversary, and Karen has gotten Plankton the best anniversary gift ever-the Krabby Patty formula! But she refuses to give it to him until Plankton gives her the best gift ever, too. If only he knew what that was!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Raphaels brothers just dont understand him. Not only does he NEED to fight, hes really good at it, or at least thats what his new boxing trainer named Spuds told him. Spuds even ENCOURAGES Raph to work out his anger and negativity through fighting, even if his family and the annoying Pigeon Pete dont get it. But although the Turtles dont see eye to eye, they must work together to stop a rampaging Rocksteady and Bebop from wrecking the city! Social media blew up with videos of the two Mutanimals going berserk, fighting each other without seeming to know what was going on around them. And all the while, doing some serious damage to the city! As the dust settles, is there someone behind the whole plot, pulling the strings?

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: All of Raphs wildest dreams are coming true in the underground Mutant Battle Arena! He gets to let loose, fighting the massive Mutanimals Bebop and Rocksteady; even the hug-loving Mondo Gecko joins in on the fun! Raph doesnt hold back, and he gets his butt kicked with a smile on his face. Not only that, hes getting some serious bling in exchange for being part of the fights - gold chains, new clothes, even his very own vehicle, the TURTLE TANK! This makes Donnie, Leo, and Mikey very suspicious, since Raph has kept everything a secret from them. But audiences love Raph, which pleases the crime boss Kitsune and her street gang, the Purple Dragons. They run the arena with the help of an obnoxious investor named Knox. But Raphs dream may become a nightmare, as Raph is oblivious to the fact that hes walked right into their trap!

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: In a world where the Autobots and Decepticons are fighting...Read more for power, a new breed of mutants is caught between the two. These young robots are trying to figure out where they fit in the universe.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Cleo tries to make a home-cooked meal to raise Clawdeens spirits and cure her homesickness. // Ghoulia helps Lagoona find her precious, secret toy, investigating all their classmates to find the culprit.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester are a pair of hilariously individual twins who live in a weird and wonderful alternate reality where your neighbour could be a pair of disgruntled trousers or your best friend a floating cloud of bottom burp. But, unlike their friends and neighbours, Best and Bester have the unique ability to choose a new body every single day and, in doing so, experience life in a completely different way.

When she travels she always take with her a little back with survival equipment and a singing map.

His cool part time gig as Kid Danger, takes him on out of this world adventures as the sidekick-in-training to famous superhero Captain Man. They go on bizarre and crazy travels, battling criminals and villains that try to attack his hometown and Captain Man himself. Meanwhile at home, Henry has to stay in hiding, keeping his sidekick job as a secret from his best friends, Charlotte and Jasper, and little sister Piper. What exciting adventures will Kid Danger get up to with Captain Man and will be he be able to hide his alter ego from his friends and family?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang and his friends hear rumors about surviving airbenders, they decide to stop by the Northern Air Temple on their way to the North Pole to see for themselves. What they find is a bunch of people who arent airbenders, but have mastered the art of gliding. This upsets Aang because they have been defacing the temple. However, there was one part of the temple, where nobody has been able to enter and what Aang and his friends discover inside spells oncoming conflict.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr Krabs gets trapped in Bikini Bottoms brand-new bank in Safe Deposit Krabs, and then in Planktons Pet, Plankton gets a pet to cheer himself up. 15:00 Rock, Paper, Scissors Rock, Paper and Scissors are three best friends who share an apartment together and compete over everything. Week to week, they have tiny problems that always get out of hand. (Subtitled) 15:15 Rock, Paper, Scissors Rock, Paper and Scissors are three best friends who share an apartment together and compete over everything. Week to week, they have tiny problems that always get out of hand. (Subtitled)

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob SquarePants is a cartoon series starring the yellow sea sponge Spongebob who lives deep in the ocean in the underwater town called Bikini Bottom. Together with his buddy the pink starfish Patrick, he experiences the craziest and most exciting adventures. Spongebob has a very energetic and optimistic character and works as a chef in restaurant "The Krusty Krab" where he makes the best burgers of the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob SquarePants is a cartoon series starring the yellow sea sponge Spongebob who lives deep in the ocean in the underwater town called Bikini Bottom. Together with his buddy the pink starfish Patrick, he experiences the craziest and most exciting adventures. Spongebob has a very energetic and optimistic character and works as a chef in restaurant "The Krusty Krab" where he makes the best burgers of the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Lost in Bikini Bottom: On his way to work, SpongeBob attempts to take a shortcut to get there quicker, only to find himself in an abandoned area of Bikini Bottom, and unable to find his way out. Tutor Sauce: After failing his drivers test, SpongeBob consults Mr. Krabs for driving lessons. Even with the experience Mr. Krabs gained from teaching his daughter, SpongeBob would prove it to be a difficult task for Mr. Krabs to teach him.

programme.title: Ментовские войны. Киев
programme.desc: Главные события сериала разворачиваются в столице до появления Национальной полиции, во время волны резонансных преступлений. За расследование запутанных дел берется лучший оперативник города, нетипичный майор и любимчик женщин Виктор Таран. Объявив войну криминальному миру, он переходит дорогу руководству, влиятельным авторитетам и завистливым коллегам.

programme.title: СуперЖена
programme.desc: Беспрецедентный баттл за титул суперженщины начинается! Каждую неделю 4 обаятельные и привлекательные девушки будут выяснять, кто же из них достоин звания лучшей жены. С понедельника по четверг дамы будут приходить друг к другу в гости, чтобы оценить хозяйственность, саморазвитие и сексуальность конкуренток. Сжульничать и выставить желаемое за действительное им не удастся, ведь за ними будет наблюдать опытный психолог. В пятницу он проведет беседы тет-а-тет и соберет девушек вместе, чтобы расставить все точки над "i".Хитрые манипуляторши, ведические жены, роковые соблазнительницы, яжматери и боевые подруги… Каждая женщина убеждена, что именно ее модель поведения самая правильная. Но кто же из них может покорить не только сердце своего мужчины, но и впечатлить конкуренток?

programme.title: Папа попал
programme.desc: Вас приветствует самое весёлое семейное телешоу "Папа попал". По правилам проекта участником шоу может стать абсолютно любой мужчина, у которого есть уставшая от жизни и бытовых проблем жена, а также минимум двое детей. В то время, как супруга уезжает отдыхать на далёкий и красивый курорт, ее муж начинает принимать на себя все обязанности своей благоверной. На протяжении 7 дней папа должен будет выполнять абсолютно все задания и поручения, которые обычно выполняет его жена. Уборка, стирка, поход за покупками, воспитание детей и поддержание уюта в доме - всё это теперь ляжет на сильные плечи украинских пап. Более того, участники шоу должны будут сделать еще и множество чисто мужских работ, которые долгие годы их просили выполнить их супруги. Починить забор, поклеить обои, отремонтировать автомобиль или научить ребёнка танцевать - всё это также ляжет на плечи наших мужчин-участников. Папа может? Посмотрим!

programme.title: Свадьба вслепую
programme.desc: Право быть счастливым имеет каждый. Но не каждый может осуществить его. "Свадьба вслепую" - это уникальный украинский социальный проект, который поможет разбитым сердцам создать новую крепкую семью. Однако его создатели сразу предупреждают о том, что даже у самой идеальной пары на проекте не всегда гарантирован успех в развитии отношений друг с другом.

programme.title: На троих
programme.desc: Юмористическое скетч-шоу "На троих" - это зажигательные шутки и забавные истории, которые подсказывает сама жизнь. Персонажи "На троих" хорошо знакомы зрителям - это обычные врачи, гаишники, полицейские, офисный "планктон". Новые серии и десятки комических историй - в проекте "На троих" от актеров "Дизель Шоу"!

programme.title: Крепостная
programme.desc: Юная сирота Катерина Вербицкая — очень красивая, умная и образованная девушка. Благодаря ее крестной матери Катю воспитали как барышню благородных кровей. Она знает иностранные языки, играет на фортепиано, рисует и прекрасно понимает, что все это никак не облегчит судьбу рожденной в неволе. Катерина принадлежит самым богатым помещикам в Нежине — Червинским. Девушка существует между двумя мирами — миром крепостных и дворян. И ни в одном из них для нее нет места.

programme.title: Крепостная
programme.desc: Юная сирота Катерина Вербицкая — очень красивая, умная и образованная девушка. Благодаря ее крестной матери Катю воспитали как барышню благородных кровей. programme.title: Владимирская,
programme.desc: В Подольском райотделе полиции Киева создается оперативная группа, задача которой - расследовать по горячим следам сложные, запутанные и загадочные преступления…

programme.title: Спасатели
programme.desc: Сериал включает в себя приключения разных людей, которые в знойное лето отправились отдыхать на побережье Черного моря. В сюжете в глаза бросаются спасатели, которые всегда начеку спасти красавиц-девушек, но почему-то совершенно не настроены протянуть руку помощи остальным остронуждающимся. Выделяется и семья, оказавшаяся среди моря. Вместо того, чтоб сплотиться и выбраться из сложившихся обстоятельств, они ищут виновного в случившемся, а это тянет за собой новые семейные ссоры. Где же как не на пляже настоящая летняя атмосфера, приятная музычка, прохладные коктейли... Для тех, кому катастрофически этого не хватает - сериал "Спасатели".

programme.title: Спасатели

programme.title: Владимирская,
programme.desc: В Подольском райотделе полиции Киева создается оперативная группа, задача которой - расследовать по горячим следам сложные, запутанные и загадочные преступления…

programme.title: Короли палат
programme.desc: Поликлиника- место, где спасают жизни. Здесь работают два кардинально разных брата. Их отношения иногда доводят до слез, но чаще всего слезы появляются от смеха.

programme.title: Короли палат
programme.desc: Поликлиника- место, где спасают жизни. Здесь работают два кардинально разных брата. Их отношения иногда доводят до слез, но чаще всего слезы появляются от смеха.

programme.title: Суббота
programme.desc: Юмористический сериал, герои которого - простая семья, на одну из суббот которой пришлась пятнадцатая годовщина свадьбы. На празднование такого важного события съезжается чуть ли не вся семья - дом ломится от родственников. В результате, праздник выходит из-под контроля, и по определенным причинам гостям приходится задержаться дольше, чем кто-либо мог ожидать. Интересно, что некоторые герои украинского сериала на 1+1 были бы не против быстрее уехать домой, но получается так, что каждую субботу происходит нечто, что заставляет задержаться их еще на неделю - и так каждый раз. Как долго один дом сможет выдержать такое количество гостей? А как насчет его хозяев?

programme.title: Суббота
programme.desc: Юмористический сериал, герои которого - простая семья, на одну из суббот которой пришлась пятнадцатая годовщина свадьбы. programme.title: На троих

Персонажи "На троих" хорошо знакомы зрителям - это обычные врачи, гаишники, полицейские, офисный "планктон". Новые серии и десятки комических историй - в проекте "На троих" от актеров "Дизель Шоу"!

programme.title: Дизель-шоу
programme.desc: Каждый выпуск "Дизель-шоу" - это час настоящего народного юмора в исполнении блестящих резидентов шоу. Среди участников "Дизель-шоу" талантливые актеры, известные КВНщики и самобытные шоумены. Вся команда, бесспорно, прекрасно чувствует друг друга, а потому так легко и непринужденно дарит хорошее настроение своим зрителям. Концерты Дизель-шоу давно уже стали желанным событием в каждом городе Украины, а поэтому билеты на такие мероприятия раскупаются мгновенно. Поэтому лучше купить билеты заранее.

programme.title: Ментовские войны. Киев
programme.desc: Зинкевич попадается на крючок со взяткой, за ним следит "наружка", чтобы выйти на заказчика. Однако его коллег настораживает, что Зинкевич не страхуется и не прячется от слежения. Появляется идея, что он связался с криминалом не по своей воле. В Варшаве считают, что к Кресту приедет киллер, и Таран попадает под подозрение.

programme.title: Ментовские войны. Киев
programme.desc: Главные события сериала разворачиваются в столице до появления Национальной полиции, во время волны резонансных преступлений. programme.desc: Юная сирота Катерина Вербицкая — очень красивая, умная и образованная девушка. Благодаря ее крестной матери Катю воспитали как барышню благородных кровей. Она знает иностранные языки, играет на фортепиано, рисует и прекрасно понимает, что все это никак не облегчит судьбу рожденной в неволе. Катерина принадлежит самым богатым помещикам в Нежине — Червинским. Девушка существует между двумя мирами — миром крепостных и дворян. И ни в одном из них для нее нет места.

programme.title: Ментовские войны. Киев
programme.desc: Зинкевич попадается на крючок со взяткой, за ним следит "наружка", чтобы выйти на заказчика. Однако его коллег настораживает, что Зинкевич не страхуется и не прячется от слежения. Появляется идея, что он связался с криминалом не по своей воле. В Варшаве считают, что к Кресту приедет киллер, и Таран попадает под подозрение.

programme.title: Ментовские войны. Киев
programme.desc: Главные события сериала разворачиваются в столице до появления Национальной полиции, во время волны резонансных преступлений. За расследование запутанных дел берется лучший оперативник города, нетипичный майор и любимчик женщин Виктор Таран. Объявив войну криминальному миру, он переходит дорогу руководству, влиятельным авторитетам и завистливым коллегам.

programme.title: На троих
programme.desc: Юмористическое скетч-шоу "На троих" - это зажигательные шутки и забавные истории, которые подсказывает сама жизнь. Персонажи "На троих" хорошо знакомы зрителям - это обычные врачи, гаишники, полицейские, офисный "планктон". Новые серии и десятки комических историй - в проекте "На троих" от актеров "Дизель Шоу"!

programme.title: Спасатели
programme.desc: Сериал включает в себя приключения разных людей, которые в знойное лето отправились отдыхать на побережье Черного моря. В сюжете в глаза бросаются спасатели, которые всегда начеку спасти красавиц-девушек, но почему-то совершенно не настроены протянуть руку помощи остальным остронуждающимся. Выделяется и семья, оказавшаяся среди моря. Вместо того, чтоб сплотиться и выбраться из сложившихся обстоятельств, они ищут виновного в случившемся, а это тянет за собой новые семейные ссоры. Где же как не на пляже настоящая летняя атмосфера, приятная музычка, прохладные коктейли... Для тех, кому катастрофически этого не хватает - сериал "Спасатели".

programme.desc: Поликлиника- место, где спасают жизни. Здесь работают два кардинально разных брата. Их отношения иногда доводят до слез, но чаще всего слезы появляются от смеха.

programme.title: Суббота
programme.desc: Юмористический сериал, герои которого - простая семья, на одну из суббот которой пришлась пятнадцатая годовщина свадьбы. На празднование такого важного события съезжается чуть ли не вся семья - дом ломится от родственников. В результате, праздник выходит из-под контроля, и по определенным причинам гостям приходится задержаться дольше, чем кто-либо мог ожидать. Интересно, что некоторые герои украинского сериала на 1+1 были бы не против быстрее уехать домой, но получается так, что каждую субботу происходит нечто, что заставляет задержаться их еще на неделю - и так каждый раз. Как долго один дом сможет выдержать такое количество гостей? А как насчет его хозяев?

programme.title: Дизель-шоу
programme.desc: Каждый выпуск "Дизель-шоу" - это час настоящего народного юмора в исполнении блестящих резидентов шоу. Среди участников "Дизель-шоу" талантливые актеры, известные КВНщики и самобытные шоумены. Вся команда, бесспорно, прекрасно чувствует друг друга, а потому так легко и непринужденно дарит хорошее настроение своим зрителям. Концерты Дизель-шоу давно уже стали желанным событием в каждом городе Украины, а поэтому билеты на такие мероприятия раскупаются мгновенно. Поэтому лучше купить билеты заранее.

programme.title: Ментовские войны. Харьков
programme.desc: Продолжение культового сериала на телеканале 2+2 онлайн. Все фанаты криминальных историй смогут увидеть, как будет разворачиваться сюжет в новом городе, с новыми людьми и преступлениями, которые придется раскрывать умным следователем. Особенно трудно им будут даваться дела, в которых замешаны "оборотни в погонах" - сотрудники структур, которые должны защищать граждан, а не наоборот. Телеканал 2+2 онлайн гарантирует, что новый сериал понравится вам еще больше двух предыдущие проекты, действия которых разворачивались в Одессе и Киеве. К тому же, вы сможете испытать свои силы в решение запутанных дел - вдруг, вы поймете, кто именно является преступником, раньше, чем главные герои сериала? Смотрите 2+2 онлайн, и узнайте все первыми!

programme.title: СуперЖена
programme.desc: Беспрецедентный баттл за титул суперженщины начинается! Каждую неделю 4 обаятельные и привлекательные девушки будут выяснять, кто же из них достоин звания лучшей жены. С понедельника по четверг дамы будут приходить друг к другу в гости, чтобы оценить хозяйственность, саморазвитие и сексуальность конкуренток. Сжульничать и выставить желаемое за действительное им не удастся, ведь за ними будет наблюдать опытный психолог. В пятницу он проведет беседы тет-а-тет и соберет девушек вместе, чтобы расставить все точки над "i".Хитрые манипуляторши, ведические жены, роковые соблазнительницы, яжматери и боевые подруги… Каждая женщина убеждена, что именно ее модель поведения самая правильная. Но кто же из них может покорить не только сердце своего мужчины, но и впечатлить конкуренток?

programme.title: Папа попал
programme.desc: Вас приветствует самое весёлое семейное телешоу "Папа попал". По правилам проекта участником шоу может стать абсолютно любой мужчина, у которого есть уставшая от жизни и бытовых проблем жена, а также минимум двое детей. В то время, как супруга уезжает отдыхать на далёкий и красивый курорт, ее муж начинает принимать на себя все обязанности своей благоверной. На протяжении 7 дней папа должен будет выполнять абсолютно все задания и поручения, которые обычно выполняет его жена. Уборка, стирка, поход за покупками, воспитание детей и поддержание уюта в доме - всё это теперь ляжет на сильные плечи украинских пап. Более того, участники шоу должны будут сделать еще и множество чисто мужских работ, которые долгие годы их просили выполнить их супруги. Починить забор, поклеить обои, отремонтировать автомобиль или научить ребёнка танцевать - всё это также ляжет на плечи наших мужчин-участников. Папа может? Посмотрим!

programme.title: Свадьба вслепую
programme.desc: Право быть счастливым имеет каждый. Но не каждый может осуществить его. "Свадьба вслепую" - это уникальный украинский социальный проект, который поможет разбитым сердцам создать новую крепкую семью. Однако его создатели сразу предупреждают о том, что даже у самой идеальной пары на проекте не всегда гарантирован успех в развитии отношений друг с другом.

programme.desc: Katru darba dienu kopā ar dažādu nozaru speciālistiem, kā arī "Delfi" un citu mediju žurnālistiem aicinām skatītājus spriest par kādu aktuālu tematu - politiķu lēmumiem un to sekām, amatpersonu rīcību un tās motīviem, pārmaiņām sabiedrībā un tās virzītām iniciatīvām, pasaulē notiekošo un tā ietekmi uz Latviju, sasniegumiem un zaudējumiem sportā, kultūras personībām un procesiem.

programme.title: Gaidām ciemos!
programme.desc: "Gaidām ciemos!" ir par dažādu valstu kultūru, vēsturi un tradīcijām. Raidījuma vadītājs Zurabs Dvaļi ceļo un aicina skatītājus kopā ar viņu pastaigāties pa skaistām vietām, novērtēt apskates vietas, apbrīnot dabu un satikt interesantus cilvēkus. Skatītāji vispirms uzzinās interesantus vēstures faktus par dažādu valstu slavenākajiem vai aizmirstākajiem reģioniem, bet pēc tam izzinās kulinārijas tradīcijas, kopā ar raidījuma viesiem gatavojot vairākus ēdienus.

programme.title: IzMet gudri
programme.desc: Raidījuma "IzMet gudri" sestajā epizodē viesosimies uzņēmumos, kuri raduši inovatīvus risinājumus cīņai ar atkritumiem dabā un to pārstrādi. Ielūkosimies, kā mūsdienīgas tehnoloģijas un radoša pieeja palīdz samazināt piesārņojumu un piešķirt jaunu dzīvi šķietami nevajadzīgiem materiāliem. Uzzināsim, kā top ilgtspējīgi produkti no pārstrādātiem resursiem un kā uzņēmēji veicina aprites ekonomikas attīstību.

programme.title: Ceļā uz mājām
programme.desc: CEĻĀ UZ MĀJĀM: turpinām būvēt jaunākajā epizodē Lauris Zalāns un Madara Kivkucāne uzloka piedruknes un pieliek roku darbos RADIO TEV biroja telpās - ko svarīgi zināt par špakteļa uzklāšanu un citiem ar iekštelpu apdari saistītiem darbiem, uzzini CEĻĀ UZ MĀJĀM: turpinām būvēt.

programme.title: Kā pieci pirksti
programme.desc: Šonedēļ raidījumā ""Kā pieci pirksti" runāsim par par Latvijā notiekošo straujo enerģētikas transformāciju - vēja un saules enerģijas izrāvienu, investīciju pieplūdumu un ceļu uz lielāku neatkarību no fosilā kurināmā. Apskatīsim arī, kā šīs pārmaiņas ietekmē elektroenerģijas ražošanu.

programme.title: Copes lietas
programme.desc: Divu azartisku makšķernieku piedzīvojumi Latvijas un citu zemju ūdeņos. Iepazīsimies ar visiem makšķerēšanas veidiem - no pludiņa līdz pat mušai, ieskatoties gan pašā makšķerēšanas procesā, gan arī katra makšķerēšanas stila inventāra apguvē.

programme.title: Reģionālās Televīzijas piedāvā
programme.desc: 02:15 Jēkabpils laiks (Vidusdaugavas TV); 02:30 Ventspils ziņas (Ventas balss); 02:45 Vidzemē (Vidzemes TV) 03:00 Runā Latgale (LRT).

programme.title: Spried ar Delfi
programme.desc: Katru darba dienu kopā ar dažādu nozaru speciālistiem, kā arī "Delfi" un citu mediju žurnālistiem aicinām skatītājus spriest par kādu aktuālu tematu - politiķu lēmumiem un to sekām, amatpersonu rīcību un tās motīviem, pārmaiņām sabiedrībā un tās virzītām iniciatīvām, pasaulē notiekošo un tā ietekmi uz Latviju, sasniegumiem un zaudējumiem sportā, kultūras personībām un procesiem.

programme.title: Ceļot bez robežām
programme.desc: Ceļojums bez robežām turpinās - šoreiz komanda ar kuģīti nonāk burvīgajā Venēcijā. Diena paiet, nesteidzīgi izzinot pilsētas šarmu - līkumojot gar kanāliem un ieklīstot šaurajās, noslēpumainajās ieliņās.Turpinājumā divas dienas tiek pavadītas dažādos Itālijas kempingos, ļaujot skatītājiem ielūkoties kempinga dzīves aizkulisēs un saprast, kāpēc Itālija ir tik iecienīts galamērķis ceļotājiem ar kemperiem. Dodoties mājup, ceļš pārtop piedzīvojumā - elpu aizraujoši kalnu skati, līkumaini serpentīni un pat sniegota kalnu pāreja. Nakts gleznainā kempingā sniedz pelnītu atelpu pirms. Epizodes izskaņā - iespaidīgais Tiroles ūdenskritums un pasakainā Neišvānšteinas pils, viena no Vācijas skaistākajām arhitektūras pērlēm.

programme.title: Ventas balss
programme.desc: Raidījums "Ventas Balss" aicina skatītājus doties iedvesmojošā ceļojumā gar Ventas upes krastiem, iepazīstot cilvēkus, kuru dzīve, darbs un stāsti savijušies ar šo apkaimi. Katrā epizodē satiksim interesantas un daudzveidīgas personības no Ventspils, Ventspils novada un citām Ventas piekrastes vietām - radošus prātus, uzņēmējus, ārstus, sportistus, skolotājus, amatniekus un vienkārši aizrautīgus dzīves baudītājus. Tā ir iespēja ielūkoties viņu ikdienā, dzirdēt personiskus stāstus un sajust reģiona unikālo garu caur cilvēku pieredzi un skatījumu uz dzīvi.

programme.title: ReTV Ziņas
programme.desc: Informācijas līderis reģionos - ReTV. Jaunākās ziņas katru darbdienu 15.00, 19.00 un 21.00.

programme.title: Meža stāsti
programme.desc: ⁠800km - ar laivām pāri Latvijai. 800 kilometri, 22 upes un viena Latvija. Divi draugi ar vēlmi ieraudzīt māti dabu devās piedzīvojumā ko neviens līdz šim nebiaj veicis. No Zilupes līdz Bernātu ragam. Kāda ir mūsu zemes ūdens asinsrite? Kādas ir cilvēku pēdas upju krastos, tur kur bijs vien retais. Šis stāsts būs par diviem puišiem - darītājiem un dabas vērtotājiem, kuri izdarīja to ko neviens līdz šim.

programme.title: Līdaku ielenktie
programme.desc: ReTV ar prieku piedāvā skatītājiem pirmo Latvijā tapušo dokumentālo piedzīvojumu TV seriālu makšķerniekiem! Tas būs saistošs gan mūsu lielajai copmaņu komūnai, gan arī dabas piedzīvojumu cienītājiem. Seriālā atspoguļotas sešu pieredzējušu piedzīvojumu meklētāju-makšķernieku gaitas, pirmo reizi dodoties ar mašīnām un jumta teltīm Norvēģijas virzienā, meklējot tās mazskartajos ūdeņos līdakas, foreles un citas zivis. Pirms došanās ceļā pavadītas daudz stundas, rūpīgi pētot kartes, ūdeņus, makšķernieku forumus Latvijā un Novēģijā, kā arī ievācot informāciju no tiem retajiem Latvijas makšķerniekiem, kas pabijuši Norvēģijas iekšzemes ūdeņos, meklējot līdakas un citas zivis. Salikts plāns, kura viena no stabilākajām un nemainīgajām lietām ir… pārmaiņas, pielāgošanās apstākļiem, nezināmajam un neparedzamajam. 10 dienās džeki saskārās gan ar copi, gan necopi, gan izmisumu, gan plānu maiņu, gan viegliem, gan grūtiem lēmumiem un visu citu, kas piestāv šādam ceļojumam.

programme.title: Zini savas tiesības
programme.desc: Darījumi ar nekustamajiem īpašumiem ir zem valsts uzraudzības lupas. Kādi ir krāpniecības riski, kā veikt darījumu, lai izvairītos no apkrāpšanas un nelikumībām. Kā noformēt nekustamā īpašuma darījumu un kāpēc ir svarīgi uzrādīt darījuma patieso cenu.

programme.title: Tiksimies stacijā!
programme.desc: "Tiksimies stacijā!" 2.sezona ir klāt! 11 epizodēs dosimies dažādās dzelzceļa līnijās un stāstīsim to staciju stāstus, kurās pasažieru vilciens vairs nepietur. Atmiņas, pētījumi un šodienas saimnieku stāsti par ēkām, kurās reiz piestāja vilciens, kuras reprezentēja valsti, novadu, pagastu, kas bija nozīmīgas cilvēku pulcēšanās vietas.

programme.title: Meža veča emuāri
programme.desc: Cesvainieši, kuri ar entuziasmu un iniciatīvu jau trešo gadu apceļo Latviju kopā ar dažāda vecuma skolēniem, aizpildot aili skolēnu apmācīšanā vides un izdzīvošanas jautājumos. Viena diena kopā ar "Mana Daba" idejas autoriem un aktīvistiem. Uģis un Agnis. Viena diena kopā ar idejas autoriem un iniciatoriem.

programme.title: Spried ar Delfi
programme.desc: Katru darba dienu kopā ar dažādu nozaru speciālistiem, kā arī "Delfi" un citu mediju žurnālistiem aicinām skatītājus spriest par kādu aktuālu tematu - politiķu lēmumiem un to sekām, amatpersonu rīcību un tās motīviem, pārmaiņām sabiedrībā un tās virzītām iniciatīvām, pasaulē notiekošo un tā ietekmi uz Latviju, sasniegumiem un zaudējumiem sportā, kultūras personībām un procesiem.

programme.title: Pa Latvijas dabas takām
programme.desc: Iepazīsti Latvijas dabas takas! (arhīvs 2018./ 2019.gads)

programme.title: Reģionālās Televīzijas piedāvā
programme.desc: 09:15 Jēkabpils laiks (Vidusdaugavas TV); 09:30 Ventspils ziņas (Ventas balss); 09:45 Vidzemē (Vidzemes TV) 10:00 Runā Latgale (LRT).

programme.title: Ventas balss
programme.desc: Raidījums "Ventas Balss" aicina skatītājus doties iedvesmojošā ceļojumā gar Ventas upes krastiem, iepazīstot cilvēkus, kuru dzīve, darbs un stāsti savijušies ar šo apkaimi. Katrā epizodē satiksim interesantas un daudzveidīgas personības no Ventspils, Ventspils novada un citām Ventas piekrastes vietām - radošus prātus, uzņēmējus, ārstus, sportistus, skolotājus, amatniekus un vienkārši aizrautīgus dzīves baudītājus. Tā ir iespēja ielūkoties viņu ikdienā, dzirdēt personiskus stāstus un sajust reģiona unikālo garu caur cilvēku pieredzi un skatījumu uz dzīvi.

programme.title: Manas jaunās mājas Latgale
programme.desc: Ventspilniece Anna Paula Arklone pēc studijām RTU elektronikas fakultātē kopā ar vīru pārcēlās uz viņa dzimto novadu Latgali, lai realizētu vīra sapni par savu auto remontdarbnīcu. Pabeidzot "Mācībspēka" organizētās apmācības, viņa atrada pedagoģes darbu netālajā Rudzātu vidusskolā. Kā attīstījusies Annas karjera, kā viņai patīk dzīve laukos un kāda ir situācija ar pedagogiem Latgalē un Līvānu novadā, skatieties raidījumā "Manas jaunās mājas - Latgale".

programme.title: Mājā un sētā
programme.desc: Pavasaris ir klāt, un līdz ar to - arī iedvesmojošais raidījums "Mājā un sētā"! Drīz sāksies dārza darbi, un mēs būsim klāt, lai kopā smeltos idejas, padomus un iedvesmu! Vai vēlies uzlabot savu māju, pagalmu vai dārzu? Mēs dosimies pie saimniekiem, kuri savu ikdienu padara radošu un krāsainu - gan pilsētās, gan laukos! Vēl, dosimies ciemos pie sabiedrībā zināmu personu mīļdzīvniekiem. Parunāsim par to, kā skrienošajā ikdienā apievienot rūpes par mājdzīvnieku un gūt iedvesmu jauniem darbiem? Skaties raidījumu "Mājā un sētā", un ļauj pavasara enerģijai ienākt tavā ikdienā - ar darbiem, idejām un prieku!

programme.title: Ceļot bez robežām
programme.desc: Ceļojums bez robežām turpinās - šoreiz komanda ar kuģīti nonāk burvīgajā Venēcijā. Diena paiet, nesteidzīgi izzinot pilsētas šarmu - līkumojot gar kanāliem un ieklīstot šaurajās, noslēpumainajās ieliņās.Turpinājumā divas dienas tiek pavadītas dažādos Itālijas kempingos, ļaujot skatītājiem ielūkoties kempinga dzīves aizkulisēs un saprast, kāpēc Itālija ir tik iecienīts galamērķis ceļotājiem ar kemperiem. Dodoties mājup, ceļš pārtop piedzīvojumā - elpu aizraujoši kalnu skati, līkumaini serpentīni un pat sniegota kalnu pāreja. Nakts gleznainā kempingā sniedz pelnītu atelpu pirms. Epizodes izskaņā - iespaidīgais Tiroles ūdenskritums un pasakainā Neišvānšteinas pils, viena no Vācijas skaistākajām arhitektūras pērlēm.

programme.title: Dziesmavots
programme.desc: Frāze "es nevaru būt balts, un tas nav iespējams" mūsdienu sensitīvajā pasaulē izklausās jau kaut kā nepiedienīgi rasistiski, taču ilggadējie grupas "Tranzīts" fani un hita "Nevaru būt balts" līdzi dziedātāji ļoti labi zina, ka tai ar rasismu nav absolūti nekādas saistības, bet par ko ir runa, skaidros Atis Zviedris! Tāpat uzzināsim kā šodien klājas slavenākajam dziedošajam policistam Nikolajam Puzikovam un aizvedīsim atmiņu stāstījumā ar dziesmu "Dievs Tevi mīl".

programme.title: Dziesmavots
programme.desc: Mums netrūkst Maestro Raimonda Paula retrohitu, taču daži pamanījušies kļūt par mūžīgiem megahitiem. Raidījumā "Dziesmavots" par vienu no spilgtiem piemēriem- "Genoveva" - jestrs un melodisks Žorža Siksnas izpildīts skaņdarbs, kas joprojām liek kustēties un dziedāt līdzi. Savukārt, raidījuma otrajā daļā mūsdienu megahits, kuru radījuši, iespējams, jautrākā Latvijas puišu grupu - "Citi Zēni", skaidrosim kā tapa dziesma "Lieka Štuka!".

programme.title: Nodokļi bez panikas
programme.desc: Nodokļi bieži vien rada apjukumu un liek cilvēkiem izvairīties no sarunām par tiem. Tieši tāpēc RADIO TEV radījis jauna koncepta raidījumu "NODOKĻI - bez panikas", lai parādītu, ka par nodokļiem var runāt cilvēcīgi un viegli, saglabājot uzticamību un profesionalitāti. "NODOKĻi - bez panikas" ir raidījums, kas iedrošina ikvienu nodokļu maksātāju būt pārliecinātam, zinošam un drošam savās izvēlēs. Raidījuma unikālo konceptu un tā dinamiku veidos divi vadītāji ar pilnīgi atšķirīgām profesionālām pieredzēm - nodokļu konsultante Ieva Liepiņa un influenceris Dāvis Ķimenis (Amuna Davis). Kā pašnodarbinātais, Dāvis ikdienā sastopas ar "mazo nodokļu maksātāja" realitāti, tādēļ nebaidās uzdot jautājumus, kas šķiet neērti vai reizēm pat "naivi", savukārt Ievas profesionālie un viegli saprotamie skaidrojumi palīdz skatītājiem ieraudzīt, ka nodokļi nav bieds, bet gan instruments, kuru var gudri izmantot.

programme.title: Izstāsti Latvijai
programme.desc: Raidījums, kurā par sabiedrībā aktuālajām tēmām runās nozares eksperti un viedokļu līderi, savus veiksmes stāstus stāstīs uzņēmēji un tiks testēti produkti.

programme.title: ReTV Ziņas
programme.desc: Informācijas līderis reģionos - ReTV. Jaunākās ziņas katru darbdienu 15.00, 19.00 un 21.00.

programme.title: Latvijas stāsti
programme.desc: Jaunsātu pagasts ir daļa no Tukuma novada, un šķietami atrodas nekurienes vidū. Taču pēdējos gados to par dzīves vietu izvēlējušies vairāki cilvēki, kam rūp ne tikai savas mājas un sētas sakārtošana, bet arī pagasta dzīves uzlabošana. Mājas kafejnīcas, koncerti, Baltijā lielākā viduslaiku katapulta... tas viss un vēl vairāk lauž pieņēmumu par dzīvi nekurienē.

programme.title: Kā pieci pirksti
programme.desc: Šonedēļ raidījumā ""Kā pieci pirksti" runāsim par par Latvijā notiekošo straujo enerģētikas transformāciju - vēja un saules enerģijas izrāvienu, investīciju pieplūdumu un ceļu uz lielāku neatkarību no fosilā kurināmā. Apskatīsim arī, kā šīs pārmaiņas ietekmē elektroenerģijas ražošanu.

programme.desc: 17:00 Aktuāli Zemgalē (Zemgales Reģionālā TV); 17:15 Jēkabpils laiks (Vidusdaugavas TV); 17:30 Kuldīgas novadu vēstis (Skrundas TV); 17:45 TV Kurzeme piedāvā.

programme.title: Kāpēc
programme.desc: Žurnāliste Alina Lastovska katru nedēļu stundu garā raidījumā piedāvā karstas un aktuālas diskusijas, kā arī analītiskas intervijas, kas palīdz atrast atbildes uz tik dažādajiem "kāpēc", izgaismojot neērtas patiesības, atbildīgo personu patiesās domas un rīcības motīvus, atklājot cēloņsakarības un to, kādas korekcijas nepieciešamas "kursā", lai veicinātu Latvijas izaugsmi.

programme.title: ReTV Ziņas
programme.desc: Informācijas līderis reģionos - ReTV. Jaunākās ziņas katru darbdienu 15.00, 19.00 un 21.00.

programme.title: Mēs varam - mēs darām!
programme.desc: Televeikala skatlogs. Iedvesmojies kā hobiju pārvērst par pelnītspējīgu biznesu. Uzzini, kas tuvākā un tālākā apkārtnē atjaunots, uzlabots un pilveidots. Seko līdz, stāstiem ar kuriem varam lepoties un iespējām, kas var būt aktuālas tieši Tev!

programme.title: Ekspedīcija pa 37. paralēli
programme.desc: Lidojam no Latvijas ziemas uz Latīņamerikas pavasari! Čīles galvaspilsēta Santjago - pirmie iespaidi, klusā okeāna krastā sākam ekspedīciju pa Žila Verna romāna "Kapteiņa Granta bērni" pēdām!

programme.title: ReTV Ziņas
programme.desc: Informācijas līderis reģionos - ReTV. Jaunākās ziņas katru darbdienu 15.00, 19.00 un 21.00.

programme.title: Dvēseles deja
programme.desc: Dokumentālās filmas "Dvēseles deja" režisore Lauma Ozola, jau pirms pieciem gadiem, zināja, ka bijušās Latvijas Nacionālās operas vadošās baleta solistes Viktorijas Jansones, bet tagad Nacionālās operas baleta repetitores, talantu un karjeras līkločus, kādu dienu ierakstīs kinolentē. Šī diena ir pienākusi nemanot, aicinot izdejot Viktorijai, dzīves patiesāko deju - dvēseles deju. Apzinoties, ka viņas dvēseles deja ir spēks, kas pašas krustcelēs rodams. Tāpat arī talants, kas nolasāms katrā ieelpā un izelpā, katrā spertajā solī, kas izdejots neskaitāmas reizes. Turklāt Viktorijas Jansones dvēseles deja ir reta, jo tā ir ne tikai līdz kaulam patiesa, bet arī skrupulozi atšķirīga no ierastā un gaidāmā. Teju pat liktenīga, kas nepazīst ne bailes, ne padošanās neglābjamo spēku, lai arī sāpes un grūtības ceļā ir bijušas tuvākas par tuvu. Taču dzīve Viktoriju ir apdāvinājusi, un viņa pati sevi ir apdāvinājusi. Ar neskaitāmām dejām, kas savā grācijā līdzcilvēkiem sniedz visīstāko cieņu un apbrīnu.

programme.title: Suitu sarunas jeb DUJ BAJARI
programme.desc: Raidījumā "Suitu sarunas jeb DUJ BAJĀRI" satiekas divi sabiedriski aktīvi cilvēki ar suitu saknēm. Viens joprojām dzīvo vēsturiskajā suitu zemē, otru dzīves ceļi aizveduši tālāk. Šai raidījumā sarunāsies dziedātāja, mūziķe un pedagoģe Ance Krauze un dūdenieks Juris Lipsnis. Vai zināt, kas ir anpīzradziņi, kā suiti dēvē savu tautastērpu un kur Ance sāka savas dziedātājas gaitas? Par to un ne tikai Ances un Jura sarunā.

programme.title: Suitu sarunas jeb DUJ BAJARI
programme.desc: Raidījumā "Suitu sarunas jeb DUJ BAJĀRI" satiekas divi sabiedriski aktīvi cilvēki ar suitu saknēm. Viens joprojām dzīvo vēsturiskajā suitu zemē, otru dzīves ceļi aizveduši tālāk.
